Fair neutral skin shifts from warm peach-white in light to cooler rosy-gray in shadow, retaining fine texture.", "expression_and_gaze": "Quietly self-contained, dreamy, poised, slightly aloof. Head pitches −5°, yaws 12° frame-left and rolls 3° frame-right; aligned irises counter-turn toward the lens, showing slightly more sclera on their frame-right sides.", "hair": "Dusty pastel peach-pink rounded bob grazing the shoulders, full at both sides with a smooth crown. Soft center part; dense eyebrow-to-cheek fringe partly veils the frame-left eye, layered side panels wrap the cheeks, ears remain mostly covered, and silky ends form strong inward C-curls with fine crown flyaways.", "makeup": "Soft polished editorial makeup: luminous light base, taupe-peach lids, thin brown-black wing, defined lashes, faint peach blush and highlight, satin coral-nude lips.", "wardrobe": "Fitted deep-black rib-knit long-sleeve top with a plunging V reaching the lower sternum and visible fine ribs. One delicate silver chain follows the collarbones; no other accessories.", "scene": "Minimal interior with a smooth warm-gray wall about 40cm behind the subject. A bright-white diagonal patch fills the upper-left and narrows toward mid-left with a crisp edge; no furniture or props.", "composition": "Tight bust crop with 1–2% headroom, ending below the bust; subject fills 82% of frame height, face sits at x≈60%, and eyes align near the upper third. The left third contains gray negative space and the white wedge; hair nearly touches the top, the raised shoulder enters lower-left, and the opposite shoulder is cut by the right edge.", "pose": "Torso nearly frontal and angled 12° in depth; frame-left shoulder raised and rolled about 5cm forward while the opposite shoulder recedes. Camera distance is approximately 1.3m; arms and hands remain outside the frame, and the neck stays naturally proportional.", "lighting": "Natural window light from 10 o’clock, above and front-left, soft overall with a crisp diagonal shadow across the lower neck and chest. The face is brighter than the wall except for the luminous wedge.", "camera": "85mm eye-level tight bust portrait from approximately 1.3m, with natural compression and shallow-to-medium depth of field; face and hair sharp, wall softly rendered.", "color_grading": "Muted peach-pink, warm-gray, silver and charcoal palette; restrained saturation, medium-low contrast, deep uncrushed blacks, creamy highlight rolloff, clean matte-satin finish and very fine grain.", "quality": [ "photorealistic", "high_detail", "realistic_skin_texture", "natural_hair_detail", "realistic_fabric_texture", "realistic_anatomy" ], "negative_prompt": [ "anime, cartoon, illustration, digital painting, 2D or cel-shaded style, 3D render, CGI, any non-photorealistic rendering", "stylized or oversized eyes, eye highlight orbs", "plastic over-smoothed skin, painted skin texture, flat even skin lighting, skin unaffected by light color temperature, overexposed skin", "bad anatomy, extra or missing fingers, deformed hands, distorted arms or legs", "disproportionate or oversized head, elongated or distorted neck, unnatural head rotation", "unrealistic proportions, foreshortening artifacts", "exaggerated or overly cute expression, heavy makeup, glamour styling, studio lighting", "cluttered background, watermark, logo, text", "long hair, vivid magenta hair, straight uncurled ends, high neckline, extra jewelry, level shoulders, visible hands" ] }

images.note: Photorealistic soft editorial beauty portrait, intimate, poised, detached, quiet. Adult East Asian woman, 20–25, slim with narrow shoulders, fair neutral skin with realistic texture. Dusty peach-pink shoulder-length rounded bob, dense fringe partly covering the frame-left eye, inward C-curled ends. Tight right-of-center bust crop with the frame-left shoulder raised near the jaw. Deep-black rib-knit long-sleeve top with plunging V neckline and thin silver chain. Half-lidded gray-brown eyes toward the lens; coral lips parted 1–2mm. Warm-gray wall background with a broad bright-white diagonal wedge from the top-left. Natural 10 o’clock light producing pink hair highlights and a diagonal neck-and-chest shadow. Minimal interior, no furniture, no props. 85mm eye-level tight bust portrait, shallow-to-medium depth of field, fine grain, muted peach-pink, warm-gray, silver and charcoal palette, deep uncrushed blacks, creamy highlight rolloff. Highly realistic skin, hair, fabric, and anatomy.

Create a high-resolution, photorealistic/semi-realistic 3D CG portrait an elegant East Asian adult woman. Her bangs are slightly messy, her hair is fluffy and slightly damp, her skin is porcelain white with a cool undertone, her features are delicate like a doll's, her lips are moist and soft, and she has a slightly shy blush.

She sits on a white bed in a simple, bright room, her body slightly leaning forward, her shoulders slightly tucked in, her gaze quiet, shy, and loving as she looks at the camera. Her posture is graceful and natural, her arms hanging naturally in front of her.

Clothing: A white bandage-style fashion set, including a strapless wrap top with delicate cross-cut details, a matching white wrap mini skirt, long white bandage-style arm warmers, and a thigh wrapped in white bandages. The clothing should present an elegant, high-fashion bandage silhouette, sexy without being revealing, and not involving nudity. The fabric should have a natural tension, a layered, wrapping texture, soft folds, and slightly frayed edges.

Body details: a slender female figure, smooth and realistic skin, subtle collarbone and shoulder lines, finely detailed tattoo lines, black nails, and small, delicate earrings.

Scene and Lighting: A clean white bedroom or soft clinic backdrop, white sheets with natural wrinkles, a simple wardrobe or wall panel behind, soft sunlight streaming in from the side, soft high-key lighting, light neutral tones, dreamy soft shadows, shallow depth of field, creating a sophisticated fashion photography atmosphere, cinematic soft textures, realistic skin resolution, and detailed skin detail.

Negative Warnings:

Underage, childish bodies, explicit nudity, pornography, vulgar poses, spread legs, exaggerated anatomy, oversized heads, poorly shaped hands, extra fingers, extra limbs, twisted arms, deformed bodies, fragmented anatomy, cropped faces, cropped bodies, blurry, low quality, harsh shadows, cluttered backgrounds, wrong hair color, long hair, black hair, missing tattoos, poorly done tattoos, unrealistic skin, plastic-like skin, duplicate faces, watermarks, text, logos.

prompts.text:
主題：夏の窓辺

人物・表情：
20代女性。自然で成熟した雰囲気、幼さのない落ち着いた顔立ち。黒茶色の中長髪、空気感のある前髪と少し乱れた毛束。清透な日系写真メイク、自然な肌理、淡い血色、控えめなまつ毛、ピンクベージュの唇。顔は少し下向き、視線は伏せ気味で、静かに息を抜いたような表情。

服装・ポーズ：
白〜アイボリーの薄手コットン素材のゆったりしたVネック夏トップス。襟元は広めで、肩と鎖骨まわりに自然な抜け感がある。前身頃はやわらかくドレープし、裾が少し持ち上がって腰まわりが見える。下は淡いブルーのデニムショートパンツ。フロントのボタンを外し、ウエスト部分を少しゆるめたリラックスした着こなし。下着を強調しない、上品で生活感のある表現。
人物は窓辺のソファベンチに斜めに座り、片手を後ろのクッションにつき、もう片方の腕は画面手前へ自然に伸びる。上体は少しひねり、頭を軽く下げる。脚は自然に開きすぎず、座面に重心が乗っている。服のしわ、デニムの開いたボタン部分、手が座面に触れる接地感をリアルに描写。

背景・光：
日本の夏のマンションのリビング。右側に大きな窓と白いレースカーテン、外の緑が少しだけ見える。床は明るい木目、奥に小さな観葉植物、低い木製家具、生成りのラグ。背景は清潔で生活感があり、物は少なめ。
午前の自然光が画面右上から入り、髪、頬、鎖骨、腕、白いトップスの布の凹凸を照らす。影は画面左下へやわらかく落ち、床と座面に夏の日差しの四角い反射が入る。白い布には強すぎないハイライト、肌には自然な反射光。

構図・カメラ：
縦長2:3。少し高い位置から見下ろす近距離の写真風構図。頭から太もも上部まで入るミディアムクローズ。人物は画面中央やや右寄りに大きく配置し、窓辺と木床の余白で夏の空気を見せる。カメラはスマホで少し上から撮ったような自然な距離感。顔、胸元、ウエスト、開いたデニムのボタン部分に視線が流れる構図。背景は軽くぼかし、人物と服の質感は自然にシャープ。

質感・スタイル：
高品質な日系写真表現。過度なグラビア感ではなく、夏の部屋で撮った生活感のあるポートレート。自然な肌理、布の薄さとしわ、デニムの硬さ、木床の反射、カーテン越しの柔らかい光を丁寧に表現。色調は白、淡い木色、薄いブルーデニム、柔らかな肌色で統一。軽いフィルム感、清潔で透明感のある仕上がり。

ネガティブ：
未成年、幼い顔、過度な露出、露点、透けすぎる服、下着の強調、低俗なポーズ、過剰な性的表現、不自然な胸元、身体の歪み、手指の破綻、余分な指、関節の不自然さ、服と体の接触不良、デニムの構造崩れ、浮いた布、光源と矛盾する影、プラスチック肌、過度な美肌補正、過剰HDR、ロゴ、文字、透かし、明らかなAI感。

images.note:
Generate a safe, non-sexual photorealistic lifestyle portrait in 3:2 landscape orientation, using the attached adult East Asian woman as the visual identity reference while changing the setting, pose, wardrobe, and lighting. Adult woman in her early 20s with fair luminous skin, natural realistic facial proportions, and fine dark near-black hair. Preserve facial identity. Hair is shoulder-length, softly layered, with wispy see-through bangs at eyebrow level, soft natural side part, one side slightly tucked behind the ear, subtle flyaways catching warm morning light. Minimal natural makeup, visible realistic skin texture, natural pink-nude satin lips, soft rosy flush.

Scene: bright airy bedroom or living room in the morning, large window on the front-right streaming soft warm natural daylight through curtains, gentle lens flare, potted green plant leaves in the foreground, a large teddy bear in the softly blurred background, clean and uncluttered interior with creamy bokeh. Photorealistic casual lifestyle portrait, vertical 9:16. Adult East Asian woman age 18-24 with fair skin in soft cool-toned daylight, intimate high-key clean portrait in a minimalist bright white indoor/studio setting. Close bust/upper torso shot from slightly above eye level, 50-85mm natural portrait compression, shallow depth of field, background uniform and uncluttered.

She is centered and leaning forward closely with shoulders slightly hunched/raised in a timid closed-off posture, chin lowered slightly while face and chest remain frontal to camera. Expression is hesitant, timid, quietly anxious and guarded: inner eyebrows slightly raised and drawn together, upper eyelids heavy but slightly widened, lower lids tense, lips closed and pressed into a hesitant neutral line with no smile, slight tension around brow and mouth. Gaze: both irises aligned and looking slightly upward and off-camera to the viewer’s left, with subtle sclera visible below and to the right, troubled uncertain ga

prompts.text:
Cut 1 Prompt - Morning Kitchen Bite

1) Photo Style and Mood

Photorealistic Korean lifestyle portrait, bright morning kitchen snap, playful home editorial mood, soft natural realism, sweet and slightly dopamine-filled morning atmosphere, vertical 3:4 composition.

2) Scene Concept and Story

A beautiful young Korean woman named Arin sits playfully on a marble kitchen island in a bright white kitchen.

The moment feels like a sweet private morning scene, captured just before she takes the first bite of warm toast.
She looks slightly off to the right, as if teasing someone nearby with a cute “I’m eating first” expression.

The mood should feel casual, warm, playful, and intimate, like a soft Korean home lifestyle photo with a small touch of sweetness.

3) Location · Time · Environment

A clean white-toned kitchen in the morning.

Large sunlight comes through a wide window behind her, filling the room with soft natural light.
The kitchen feels fresh and airy, with white walls, warm wooden shelves, simple kitchen tools, and a calm everyday atmosphere.

A soft hint of steam rises from freshly toasted bread, adding warmth to the scene.

4) Background and Props

Place a gray marble kitchen island at the center of the frame.

On the left side of the island, place a toaster with freshly baked toast on top.
Beside it, add a small strawberry jam jar, a casually opened snack bag, and a few scattered bread crumbs on the marble surface.

Keep the props natural and lived-in, not messy.
The strawberry jam should create a small red accent within the white, cream, wood, and marble-gray color palette.

5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 optimized composition.

Arin sits on the edge of the marble kitchen island, placed near the center of the frame.
Her upper body catches the soft backlight from the window, while her legs fall naturally downward to create a graceful vertical rhythm.

Shoot from a slightly low front angle, not too dramatic, just low enough to make the pose feel lively and relaxed.

A beautiful young Korean woman named Arin sits playfully on a marble kitchen island in a bright white kitchen.

images.note:
Generate a photorealistic vertical 3:4 outdoor lifestyle portrait inspired by the provided concept image, but fully realistic, not anime. Young adult East Asian woman, clearly 18-22, fair skin with realistic texture, minimal natural makeup, soft peachy-pink lips, relaxed face. She sits comfortably on a wooden park bench with curved dark metal armrests, body angled 3/4 front with right shoulder closer to camera, torso slightly turned left, leaning gently back. Medium shot from head to mid-shin, natural eye-level with very slight high angle, 50mm look, shallow depth of field.

She wears a clean nostalgic school-style sailor uniform: white short-sleeve shirt with dark navy collar, light trim, large navy bow, subtle loose fabric folds; matching pleated mini skirt; opaque dark charcoal knee-high socks. An adult East Asian woman age 18-24 with fair skin, minimal natural makeup, cheerful playful expression, winking with left eye squeezed shut and right eye looking directly into the camera, open bright natural smile showing upper teeth, right brow slightly raised. She is in a brightly lit modern fast-food restaurant interior with clean tiled floor, shallow/medium depth of field, floor slightly blurred.

High-angle camera looking down, 35mm environmental perspective, close-medium three-quarter shot, face in upper third. She stands leaning forward dynamically toward camera, body 3/4 front angled slightly left, chin tilted up to lens. Left arm extended holding a black serving tray near waist level toward camera, realistic foreshortening and proportions; right arm relaxed. Tray contains realistic burger, fries, and iced coffee, no floating tray.

Wardrobe: grey short-sleeve fast-food polo shi

images.note:
Create a 9:16 vertical photorealistic cinematic dark editorial portrait of an adult woman age 20-28. Fair skin with stark warm golden rim highlights and deep cool-toned shadows. Expression is solemn, melancholic, composed, reflective and still: no smile, lips gently closed, relaxed jaw, eyebrows low with slight inward tension, heavy-lidded focused eyes. Over-the-shoulder pose: torso angled away left in rear 3/4 view, upper back and right shoulder closest to camera, head turned naturally back over the right shoulder, chin slightly lowered, eyes looking directly into the camera with a piercing steady gaze. Prioritize anatomically correct neck rotation, realistic shoulder depth, and natural human proportions.

Long golden blonde hair cascading well below shoulders, dense voluminous flowing waves, deep side sweep to the right, thick side-swept fringe/veil obscuring the left eye and brow, both ears covered, glossy silky texture with individual lit strands and fine backlit flyaways glowing a

images.note:
Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 cinematic studio portrait of an adult East Asian woman, age 20-28, in a dark minimal studio. Waist-up close-medium framing at eye level with 85mm portrait compression. She is standing turned away in a rear three-quarter pose, body axis angled about 135 degrees away from camera, back and right shoulder closest to lens, torso twisted naturally, arms resting down and not visible. Head turned sharply back over her right shoulder toward the camera, chin slightly lowered, slight roll toward right shoulder; realistic neck twist and shoulder/back anatomy, no distortion.

Expression: calm, composed, guarded and observant. Relaxed flat eyebrows, slightly heavy-lidded eyes, irises sharply aligned directly at the camera while head is turned over shoulder, soft but piercing eye contact. Lips only slightly parted 1–2mm with relaxed jaw, no smile, no mouth-corner tension. Facial muscles fully relaxed.

Appearance: fair skin with realistic texture, warm golden rim

Head turned sharply back over her right shoulder toward the camera, chin slightly lowered, slight roll toward right shoulder; realistic neck twist and shoulder/back anatomy, no distortion.

Expression: calm, composed, guarded and observant. images.note:
Create a photorealistic high-fashion streetwear editorial portrait in 9:16 vertical orientation. Adult East Asian woman, 20-25, fair skin, athletic sculptural core, realistic anatomy and proportions. Centered on a pure white infinite studio background with no clutter. Medium three-quarter fashion shot from head to mid-thigh, eye-level, 50mm look, deep focus, sharp high-end commercial editorial quality.

Subject: cool, composed, detached expression; relaxed flat brows, slightly heavy-lidded eyes looking directly into the camera, irises aligned to lens, lips slightly parted about 2mm, no smile, jaw relaxed, facial muscles calm. Polished editorial makeup: smooth matte skin, soft smudged dark liner, subtle neutral eyeshadow, light mascara, soft rosy nude natural matte lips, gentle blush and subtle cheekbone glow.

Hair: deep black cool undertone, mid-back length, long straight silky smooth hair with dense blunt bangs just above the eyes, subtle lower layers, blunt ends, natural shine, flat

images.note:
Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 outdoor close-up portrait of an adult East Asian woman (18-25) in bright early afternoon sunlight. Head-and-shoulders framing, slight low angle, camera about 0.5–1m away, subject centered with eyes near upper third. She leans slightly forward, body angled 30–45 degrees with one relaxed shoulder slightly prominent, head pitched downward toward chest, face turned slightly to her right (viewer’s left), subtle roll toward right shoulder. She looks upward directly into the lens with perfectly aligned irises, soft gentle serene gaze, relaxed eyelids (no squint), more sclera below iris, calm unguarded expression. Lips softly parted 2–3mm, lower lip slightly dropped, no smile, no tension, relaxed jaw, smooth forehead and soft cheeks.

Appearance: fair luminous dewy “glass skin” with natural texture, sheer makeup, warm peach-coral glossy lips, subtle peachy blush, very thin upper-lash eyeliner, warm peach-neutral eyeshadow, light mascara, no heavy contour.

images.note:
Generate a clean photorealistic high-key studio portrait in 4:5 vertical aspect ratio. Subject: adult East Asian woman age 18-24, fair skin with smooth but natural visible texture. Minimal natural makeup: soft matte even base, thin natural upper lash liner, subtle warm neutral eyeshadow, light mascara, soft rosy nude matte lips, very light peach blush. Expression: calm, contemplative, neutral, no smile; lips naturally closed with slight natural pout; relaxed jaw and brow. Gaze: looking upward and slightly to the viewer's left, both irises aligned high with more sclera visible below, sharp focused gaze toward an invisible point above.

主題：
午後の光

人物・表情：
20代女性。明るいアイボリーベージュ寄りの白肌で、ほんのりピンクの血色を含んだなめらかな肌。頬、鼻先、肩、鎖骨にやわらかなハイライトが入り、過度な美肌補正はせず、自然な肌理を残した繊細な質感。顔立ちは上品でやわらかな日系美人寄り、卵型の輪郭、小さめですっきりした鼻筋、やや大きめだが不自然すぎないブラウンの瞳。メイクは精密で上品なドールライク日系メイク。淡いローズピンクのチーク、シャンパンベージュとピンクブラウンのアイシャドウ、細く長いまつ毛、自然な涙袋、明るめブラウンの柔らかい眉、透け感のあるピンクベージュのグロスリップ。瞳には小さく澄んだキャッチライトを入れる。表情は静かでやわらかく、口元は軽く閉じ、カメラをまっすぐ見つめる。

服装・ポーズ：
夏らしい軽やかなアイボリーホワイトのシアー素材ワンピース風トップス。深めのVネックで、胸元は大人っぽく上品に見せる。内側に同系色の繊細なレースインナーが少しのぞく。袖は薄く透ける長袖で、手首に自然なギャザー。全体に軽いシワと柔らかな落ち感がある。体はやや斜めにして上半身を正面へ向ける。人物自身の左手を顔の横へ軽く持ち上げ、指先は自然に曲げる。肩の力を抜き、落ち着いた大人っぽい雰囲気。髪は明るいミルクティーアッシュブラウン。薄めのシースルーバング、顔まわりに沿うレイヤーカット、肩下までのミディアムロング。毛先は内側にゆるくカールし、ふんわりした空気感と自然な束感がある。一本一本の髪の流れ、細いハイライト、やわらかなツヤ、少量の自然な後れ毛を丁寧に描写する。

背景・光：
シンプルな室内の白からグレージュ寄りの壁。背景は整理されたミニマルな空間で、装飾は控えめ。画面左前方の窓から午後の自然光が差し込む。やわらかな主光に加えて、カーテンや窓枠を通した細い光束が顔にかかり、前髪、額、鼻筋、左頬の上に印象的な光の筋を作る。肩と鎖骨にも暖かい光が当たり、反対側は淡い影で立体感を出す。背景の壁にも薄く窓影が落ち、写真としての空気感を強める。光の色温度は暖かいクリームベージュ寄りで、やさしい午後のムード。

構図・カメラ：
縦構図の上半身ポートレート。人物は画面中央やや右寄り。頭頂から胸下あたりまでを収める近めのフレーミングで、左手も画面内に自然に入れる。カメラは目線よりわずかに高い位置からの自然な距離。85mm相当の中望遠ポートレート感覚。顔と瞳にしっかりピントを合わせ、背景はやわらかくぼかす。髪の束感、肌の質感、胸元の布の重なり、顔に差す光束がきれいに伝わるようにする。

質感・スタイル：
リアルな写真風AIポートレート。日本の雑誌グラビアとナチュラルポートレートの中間のような上品な仕上がり。肌はなめらかだがプラスチックのようにせず、繊細な毛流れや肌理を残す。髪は透明感のあるブラウンカラーと細いツヤを表現。服は薄手シフォンとレースの違いがわかるように描写する。色調はアイボリー、ミルクティーブラウン、ピンクベージュ、グレージュを中心にまとめる。コントラストは強すぎず、光の筋だけが印象的に見える写真表現。少しだけフィルムライクな空気感。

ネガティブ：
不自然な顔、不自然に大きすぎる目、左右非対称すぎる顔、尖りすぎた顎、過度な美肌補正、プラスチックのような肌、余分な指、欠けた指、関節の破綻、手の位置の不自然さ、髪の塊感、重すぎる前髪、不自然な胸の形、布の破綻、過剰な露出、安っぽい衣装、光源と矛盾する影、顔を隠しすぎる影、不要な小物、文字、ロゴ、透かし。

images.note:
Create a 9:16 portrait, photorealistic ethereal macro beauty editorial. Adult woman age 18-24, fair translucent porcelain skin, Caucasian/Eurasian blend. Extreme close-up less than 0.5m: only face, left ear, neck, collarbone and nearest shoulder visible; asymmetrical crop with one highly detailed eye near upper right quadrant, ear and glowing neck filling lower left. Head slightly turned toward camera-left with a tiny tilt toward left shoulder; gaze cast off-camera to the right, irises aligned right with more sclera visible on the left side. Expression profoundly serene and wistful: relaxed neutral eyebrows, slightly heavy relaxed eyelids, no smile, lips softly parted about 2mm, jaw tensionless, all facial muscles relaxed.

Natural biologically plausible human eye proportions, not anime. Tack-sharp focus on iris, eyelashes, tearduct, skin pores, individual hair strands; extremely shallow depth of field, background melting into high-key white bokeh. Long silky ultra-fine hair, cool-tone

Title:
Afternoon by the Shoji

Image generation:
Use the two attached reference images as facial and atmospheric references for the same adult woman. Do not create an exact copy of a real person; generate a fictional woman in her 20s while preserving the overall impression of the references: a small oval face, soft eyes, refined straight nose bridge, deep brown eyes, translucent pink-beige lips, and bright ivory-beige fair skin.

Subject:
An adult woman in her 20s. Her skin is bright ivory-beige with a faint rosy undertone and a smooth, natural texture. Soft highlights appear on her cheeks, nose tip, shoulders, and collarbones without overexposure, preserving realistic skin detail. Her expression is calm and gentle, with a very subtle smile as she looks into the camera. Her eyes have small, clear catchlights.

Makeup:
Elegant, precise, doll-like Japanese beauty makeup. Pale rose-pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eyeshadow, long delicate eyelashes, refined lower lashes, natural aegyo-sal, and soft arched light-brown eyebrows. The skin should not be overly retouched; keep natural skin texture.

Hair:
Pure black straight bob haircut. Thin see-through bangs, light face-framing layers, and ends that naturally curve inward just below the chin. Show fine glossy highlights and individual hair strands. Avoid clumped or helmet-like hair.

Wardrobe:
A delicate white lace camisole with ultra-thin shoulder straps, a slightly V-shaped neckline, intricate lace edging, a tiny bead-like ornament at the center, and radiating gathers flowing from under the bust toward the hem. The bottom is a black sheer tiered mini skirt with lightweight tulle layers and a subtle translucent quality. Add a delicate chain ornament with a small flower motif on the right hip. A black sheer chiffon shawl is loosely draped over her arms. Accessories include thin layered silver necklaces, a small pendant, and delicate dangling earrings.

Pose:
Her body faces forward with a slight angle. She leans her upper body very slightly forward, and her face tilts a little toward the left side of the frame. Her right hand rests naturally in front of the skirt, with fingers gently curved. Her left arm is lowered along the side and slightly behind the body, with the shawl falling over the forearm. Her waist flows slightly toward the right side of the frame, with her weight shifted onto one leg. The pose should feel natural, elegant, and portrait-like.

Background:
An elegant Japanese-modern interior. On the right side of the frame is a wooden shoji window. Near the window is a low wooden display shelf with a black ceramic vase and pale cherry blossom branches. On the left side are dark wooden cabinets and a restrained floral branch arrangement. The background is tidy, quiet, refined, and luxurious. Render the textures of wood, ceramic, and floral branches naturally.

Lighting:
The main light source is warm afternoon natural light entering through the shoji window on the right side of the frame. It softly illuminates her right shoulder, right cheek, collarbones, lace on the chest, and the surface of her hair. Shadows fall naturally toward the left side of the frame and the inner side of the body. The right side of the background is brighter, while the left side is calmer and darker. Skin gradation should be smooth, with soft transitions between light and shadow.

Composition and camera:
Vertical 4:5 portrait. Medium shot down to the upper thighs. The subject is placed slightly right of center, with a small amount of headroom. The camera is at around chest height with a natural eye-level perspective. Use a realistic 50mm portrait lens look with no distortion. Focus on both eyes, the wispy bangs, and the lace on the chest. The background is softly blurred but still recognizable, with the shoji window and cherry blossom branches creating depth.

Texture and style:
A realistic photographic AI image. Carefully render natural skin texture, fine black hair strands, lace weave, thin tulle, wood grain, and ceramic texture. The color palette should feature warm beige, white lace, black hair, and a calm contrast from the black skirt. The image should feel like it was taken with a real camera, with natural resolution, soft tonal gradation, and a clean Japanese portrait aesthetic.

Negative prompt:
Different identity, unnatural face, misaligned eyes, excessive skin smoothing, plastic skin, clumped hair, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, broken joints, unnaturally twisted shoulders or arms, broken lace pattern, deformed clothing, overly inflated skirt, floating shawl, broken accessories, distorted background, shadows inconsistent with the light source, excessive HDR, excessive saturation, CGI look, 3D-rendered look, illustration look, unwanted people, duplicated props, text, logo, watermark.

A realistic vertical 4:5 portrait photograph of a young adult East Asian woman in a 1990s point-and-shoot direct-flash snapshot style, with a Y2K retro film boudoir mood. Low-fidelity scanned film grain, slight overexposure, medium sharpness, hard on-camera flash, high contrast, and subtle colored noise in the dark areas.

The subject is seated close to the camera in a frontal pose, framed from the upper body down to partially visible raised knees. The camera angle is slightly high, and she is centered, occupying about 75% of the frame. Both knees are raised in the foreground as rounded forms at the bottom of the image.

She has cool ivory-pale skin with direct flash highlights on her cheeks, nose bridge, collarbones, shoulders, and hand. Her hair is a short black chin-length bob with thin airy bangs and a few loose messy strands. She has rounded delicate facial features, soft pink-brown eye makeup, defined lashes, light pink blush, and glossy bright red lips.

Her eyes look toward the right side of the frame, not directly at the camera. Her expression is playful, absent-minded, slightly innocent, and distracted, without smiling. She holds a red lollipop in her lips, creating a rounded pout. Her right hand holds the thin white lollipop stick near her mouth, with naturally curved fingers and subtle small nail decorations.

She wears a light-colored multicolored tiny floral spaghetti-strap camisole top made of thin matte cotton or slightly elastic ruched fabric. The straps fit closely, the chest area has a tie-front detail and a small cutout, and the fabric forms natural wrinkles and folds.

The background is simple and understated: a white window frame and pale gray window surface, with a cool dark black-green glass shadow area on the right side. A small cluster of pale flowers appears only in the lower-left corner. The overall palette is low-saturation cool gray-white and black-green, with the red lollipop and tiny floral print as small saturated accents.

Photorealistic, candid, intimate, slightly imperfect, retro flash snapshot aesthetic.

prompts.text: photorealistic high-angle selfie portrait of a beautiful young East Asian Japanese woman in her early twenties sitting on a bed beside a floor-to-ceiling high-rise apartment window with a bright city skyline of tall buildings behind her in soft morning daylight. She has long dark brown hair and is tying it up into a high ponytail, both arms raised and bent behind her head, holding a thin black elastic hair tie between her lips in her mouth. She has a slim hourglass figure, fair smooth skin, delicate natural makeup with soft brown eyes looking directly at the camera, lips slightly parted around the hair tie. She wears a fitted brown ribbed knit spaghetti-strap camisole tank top that hugs her torso. White rumpled bedsheets, a cream fleece blanket and a white pillow around her. Realistic skin texture, sharp focus, high detail, natural window light, candid intimate bedroom selfie, professional photography, young east asian japanese woman, photorealistic.

Ultra-realistic fashion street photography, beautiful young Southeast Asian woman with long wavy black hair and soft wispy bangs, flawless fair skin, slim hourglass figure, delicate facial features, sharp jawline, large expressive eyes, full natural lips, wearing glamorous makeup identical to a high-end fashion editorial: soft matte foundation, subtle contouring, warm peach blush, nude glossy lips, defined brows, soft brown smokey eyeshadow, long eyelashes, natural highlight on cheekbones.
She is posing casually while leaning against a metal street railing in a busy urban downtown environment. Wearing a white off-shoulder cropped blouse with semi-transparent chiffon sleeves, exposing one shoulder, paired with low-rise faded light-wash denim jeans. A thin white waist string crosses elegantly above the jeans. Small hoop earrings and a silver chain shoulder bag.
Confident and alluring expression, slightly tilted head, direct eye contact with camera, relaxed posture, wind gently blowing through her hair.
Background: realistic city street with taxis, brick buildings, urban graffiti walls, shallow depth of field, cinematic street atmosphere, golden afternoon sunlight, soft shadows, natural reflections, realistic perspective.
Photography style: Vogue editorial, luxury fashion campaign, ultra-detailed skin texture, photorealistic, 85mm lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, HDR, professional color grading, cinematic lighting, highly detailed, masterpiece quality, 8K resolution, realistic anatomy, natural proportions, sharp focus on subject, creamy bokeh, premium fashion photography.

text, watermark, logo, caption, UI elements, social media icons, app interface, blurry, low quality, low resolution, overexposed, oversaturated, deformed hands, extra fingers, bad anatomy, duplicate body parts, unrealistic skin, cartoon, anime, CGI, 3D render, distorted face, asymmetrical eyes, cropped head, messy composition, noise, artifacts, motion blur.

Foreground leg softly out of focus; sharp focus on face and upper body. Background sea and town blurred with shallow depth of field. Include broad sky area, place a white cloud behind the subject.

Lighting: bright clear morning exposure. Sun from upper right, creating luminous rim light along hair edges, shoulder, cheek and legs. Soft reflected fill from sky and sea on face; thin shadows fall toward lower left. Gentle natural lens flare.

Texture/detail: keep realistic skin pores and fine facial hair, natural skin texture not overly smoothed. Visible rib texture on tank top, thinness of sheer fabric, granular concrete texture. Transparent blue-and-white color palette, soft highlights.

Negative: anime face, illustration, painting, CGI look, plastic skin, over-smoothed beauty retouching, unnatural breast emphasis, excessive exposure, underwear showing, unnatural face or gaze, extra or missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, poor clothing-body contact, floating body, impossible gravity, inconsistent shadows, warped background, text, logo, watermark, extra people.

images.note:
Create a vertical 3:4 photorealistic portrait titled “Summer Sky”. Use the provided reference images only as inspiration for an adult Japanese woman’s natural mature facial features, translucent skin, subtle Japanese makeup, and dark brown hair texture; do not copy exact identity.

Scene: a quiet Japanese seaside in the morning. A woman in her 20s sits on a low concrete seawall. Far in the background, softly blurred harbor town and low mountains. Clear blue sky with large white cumulus clouds, sparkling sunlight reflections on the sea. Photorealistic yet with the crisp blue sky, white clouds, and shimmering light reminiscent of Makoto Shinkai atmospheres, but rendered as a natural photograph.

Subject: adult woman, calm and slightly dazzled expression, mouth gently parted, gaze directed slightly above the camera toward the sky. Shoulder-length dark brown hair with light bangs; sea breeze blows fine strands across her cheeks and neck. Natural elegant adult body type, healthy and refined

Photorealistic Japanese lifestyle portrait, vertical 3:4.

A young adult East Asian woman in her 20s is standing beside a large bedroom window after a nap, stretching quietly in the soft afternoon sunlight. She has bright ivory-beige natural skin, a soft oval face, delicate eyes, a natural nose bridge, and healthy pink-beige lips. Her makeup is clean and natural, with faint rose blush, fine long lashes, subtle under-eye softness, and naturally glossy lips. Her expression is calm, sleepy, and relaxed, with her eyes gently closed as if taking a slow deep breath.

Her dark brown hair is tied into a low loose bun, with thin see-through bangs and soft loose strands around her cheeks and neck. The hairstyle feels natural, elegant, and slightly undone after sleep.

She wears a white-to-ivory very thin sheer sleeveless roomwear dress, shaped like a long tank-top style short one-piece. The fabric is airy, lightweight, softly translucent in the sunlight, and hangs loosely from the body with wide deep armholes. The cloth forms delicate vertical drapes from chest to hem, with visible seams, soft folds, and a gently glowing hemline. The look remains tasteful, refined, quiet, and non-explicit.

Pose: she stands in side profile, body facing the window on the left side of the frame. Both arms are stretched high above her head, wrists lightly crossed, creating a natural waking stretch. Her weight rests on one leg while the other leg is slightly forward with a relaxed knee. Her face is shown in graceful side profile, slightly turned toward the camera, with a peaceful after-nap mood.

Background: a bright Japanese apartment bedroom. On the left is a large window with sheer white curtains, softly glowing from sunlight. Near the window is a small round wooden side table with a small green potted plant and a simple ceramic object. On the right is a white linen bed with a wooden headboard, rumpled white duvet, soft pillows, and a pale patterned cushion. The wall is light greige, with a simple wooden-framed picture hanging in the upper right.

Lighting: warm afternoon natural light enters diagonally from the left through the curtain. The light softly illuminates her face, neck, shoulders, arms, and legs. Shadows fall gently to the right. The translucent fabric catches the light along the edges and drapes, glowing softly. Pale bands of sunlight and shadow stretch across the bed, floor, and curtains.

Camera and composition: medium full-body vertical framing, from upper thighs to above the raised fingertips. The woman is placed slightly right of center, with the window on the left and the bed on the right to create depth. Camera height is around chest-to-shoulder level, natural side-view angle, not too low. Focus is on her side profile, raised arms, shoulder line, and translucent fabric drape. Background is softly blurred but still recognizable.

Style: realistic high-resolution photography, soft Japanese domestic atmosphere, warm neutral ivory, beige, and wood-brown palette. Natural skin texture with visible pores and soft blood flow, no plastic smoothing, no excessive retouching. Delicate flyaway hair catching sunlight. Clean tonal gradation, low noise, natural detail, quiet and tranquil afternoon mood.

Negative prompt: distorted face, unnatural expression, overly doll-like beauty, uneven eyes, broken nose, deformed mouth, extra fingers, missing fingers, twisted wrists, broken elbows, broken knees, warped anatomy, unrealistic neck, exaggerated chest, exaggerated waist, overly sexual pose, vulgar expression, explicit nudity, fabric clinging too tightly, malformed clothing, inconsistent shadows, blown-out skin, excessive sharpening, excessive skin smoothing, plastic skin, gritty noise, compression artifacts, text, logo, watermark, extra people, unnecessary props, distorted bed, warped window frame, broken perspective.

Create a 9:16 vertical photorealistic quirky studio fashion portrait. Subject: adult East Asian woman, age 20–25, smooth fair skin with realistic texture, minimal natural makeup, soft matte skin, subtle neutral eye makeup, natural bare lips mostly hidden. She has long straight deep near-black brown hair reaching mid-back, silky glossy, flat crown, blunt one-length cut, dense straight blunt bangs at eyebrow level, no visible part, neat with no flyaways; side hair frames face, left ear partially visible, right ear covered.

Scene and style: clean indoor photography studio, solid bright vivid red seamless backdrop, empty minimalist background, bold graphic contrast of red, white, and black. Photorealistic commercial portrait, high detail, realistic fabric, skin, anatomy.

Wardrobe and accessories: white cardigan or outer layer with large oversized black polka dots, over a dark/black collared shirt or scarf/collar with small white polka dots. Include a round front button or pendant. Thick

images.note:
Create a 9:16 vertical photorealistic modern urban fashion studio portrait, head to mid-thigh, of an adult East Asian/Eurasian woman age 20-28. Centered composition, eyes on upper third, shot at eye level with 85mm portrait compression, medium depth of field, subject fully sharp.

Subject: fair smooth realistic skin with visible pores and soft matte finish, subtle warm cheekbone highlights. Expression cool, composed, relaxed and quietly confident: head facing front with chin slightly lowered, direct piercing eye contact into lens, relaxed slightly arched brows, naturally open relaxed eyes, lips closed with a very faint asymmetrical smirk lifting the right corner, no exaggerated smile or duck lips. Polished everyday editorial makeup: smooth soft matte base, thin precise black winged eyeliner, subtle neutral brown crease depth, clean separated mascara, soft rosy pink satin lips, subtle blush and barely-there cheekbone glow.

Hair: deep rich plum violet with warm magenta undertones in lig

images.note:
Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 studio portrait of an adult East Asian woman (early 20s) in a clean minimal bright indoor studio. Close-up / bust framing, eye-level slightly above shoulder line, 85–105mm portrait compression, shallow depth of field, pure white or light gray uncluttered background.

Pose: she is facing away from the camera in a rear three-quarter angle, body turned away about 135 degrees, back and right shoulder visible and closest to lens, shoulders relaxed. Her head is turned sharply back over her right shoulder almost 90 degrees relative to torso, looking directly into the camera. Neck twist and shoulder anatomy must be realistic and elegant, with natural sternocleidomastoid and collarbone connection; no elongated or broken neck. Eyes placed near upper third, subject centered slightly right-weighted.

Expression and gaze: calm, serene, detached, aloof elegance. Heavy-lidded eyes with relaxed straight brows, no furrow, no smile. Lips naturally closed and relaxed

Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 outdoor lifestyle portrait of one clearly adult East Asian woman, age 21–26, standing under a bright blue summer sky with large white clouds.

Use an extreme low-angle upward phone-camera perspective, as if the camera is placed very low near upper-thigh height and tilted upward. The subject stands directly above the lens and looks down toward the camera. The background is almost entirely blue sky and clouds, with minimal or no ground visible.

She has a small delicate face, fair skin, soft jawline, natural nose shadow, and clean Korean-inspired summer makeup. Her expression is calm, slightly distant, and casually confident. Her lips are gently relaxed, not smiling broadly. Her gaze is directed downward toward the low camera from under the brim of a black baseball cap.

Her hair is deep brown-black, long and loose, falling from both sides of the cap over her shoulders and chest. A light outdoor breeze moves a few strands naturally around her cheeks and shoulders.

She wears a black baseball cap forward, white or pale silver over-ear headphones resting around her neck, a fitted white cropped short-sleeve T-shirt with large soft pink block-letter print across the chest, and high-waisted light gray-blue washed denim shorts. The T-shirt has natural fabric wrinkles and reveals the midriff and navel. The shorts have visible belt loops, button, front pockets, stitching, and a rolled or thick hem.

The body is slim and small-framed with natural proportions. The chest is fully covered by the T-shirt with only natural fabric contour. The thighs and shorts appear closer and larger because of the low wide-angle phone perspective, while the face appears slightly smaller and farther away. Arms hang naturally at both sides with relaxed fingers.

Lighting is strong natural midday or afternoon sunlight. The cap brim casts a realistic shadow over the upper face, while the white shirt and pale denim bounce soft light onto the chin, neck, abdomen, and arms. Skin should look warm fair and sunlit with soft natural texture, not plastic or overly smoothed.

Style: real social-media phone-photo texture, Xiaohongshu-style summer outfit snapshot, sporty-casual, fresh, bright, spontaneous, non-studio, authentic wide-angle perspective distortion, clean sky background.

Avoid underage appearance, childlike proportions, oversexualization, nudity, transparent clothing, exaggerated chest, exaggerated hips, extreme long legs, warped anatomy, plastic skin, commercial studio lighting, complex urban background, readable logos, text, watermark, deformed hands, extra fingers.

images.note:
Photorealistic vertical 9:16 outdoor lifestyle portrait of one clearly adult East Asian woman, age 21–26, standing under a bright blue summer sky with large white clouds. Low-angle upward phone-camera perspective from about waist-to-chest distance away, tilted upward, giving an authentic wide-angle social-media look while keeping the pose modest and non-suggestive. The subject stands above the camera plane and looks down gently toward the lens. Background is almost entirely blue sky and white clouds, with minimal ground visible.

She has a small delicate face, fair warm skin, soft jawline, natural nose shadow, and clean Korean-inspired summer makeup. Her expression is calm, slightly distant, and casually confident, lips gently relaxed, not smiling broadly. Her gaze is directed downward from under the brim of a black baseball cap. Her hair is deep brown-black, long and loose, falling from both sides of the cap over her shoulders, with a light breeze moving a few strands naturally around

She is wearing a loose, thin chunky-knit sweater only, with the sweater slipping down off one shoulder. The knit fabric is soft, slightly oversized, and naturally draped. The backlight passes through the open knit gaps and creates a gentle glowing halo around her body and hair. One hand is lifting or brushing back her slightly messy long dark hair, as if tidying it naturally. Her expression is relaxed, soft, and calm, with a dreamy morning mood.

Use natural soft tones, delicate realistic skin texture, airy indoor atmosphere, and subtle depth of field. Emphasize the soft sunrise backlight, the translucent knit texture, and the graceful contour of her shoulders, collarbone, and upper body. The overall result should feel poetic, elegant, natural, and beautiful, without exposing sensitive areas.

images.note: Portrait 4:5 photorealistic indoor lifestyle snapshot, cinematic summer film. Use the attached reference images as inspiration for the woman’s general East Asian features and the coastal window/sofa composition, but render as a real photograph, not illustration. An adult East Asian woman age 18-25 with fair skin lounges sideways on a blue sofa in a bright coastal living room, full body/three-quarter environmental portrait. Body mostly perpendicular to camera, chest facing frame-left, head turned about 90 degrees right in full side profile, looking horizontally out a large glass window toward the ocean; irises aligned with head direction, calm unguarded contemplative moment, soft daydreaming gaze, eyes naturally open, relaxed eyelids, neutral relaxed eyebrows, lips naturally closed with no smile, jaw relaxed, all facial muscles at rest. Medium distance 35mm lens, eye-level slightly above seated eyeline, subject centered in lower half of portrait frame, large window and bright sky/ocean

Portrait 4:5 photorealistic indoor lifestyle snapshot, cinematic summer film. An adult East Asian woman age 18-25 with fair skin lounges sideways on a blue sofa in an indoor living room, full body/three-quarter environmental portrait. She is in a calm unguarded contemplative moment, body mostly perpendicular to camera, chest facing frame-left, head turned roughly 90 degrees right in full side profile, looking horizontally out a large glass window toward the ocean; irises aligned with head direction, soft daydreaming gaze, eyes naturally open, relaxed eyelids, neutral relaxed eyebrows, lips naturally closed with no smile, jaw relaxed, all facial muscles at rest. Medium distance 35mm, eye-level slightly above seated eyeline, subject centered in lower half of portrait frame, large window and bright sky/ocean dominate upper half.

She has mid-back near-black brown hair pulled into a loose low ponytail tied with a soft light blue ribbon, soft off-center swept-back part, chin/jaw-length face

images.note:
Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 outdoor lifestyle portrait of an adult East Asian woman, age 20–25, fair skin, serene and gentle. She stands on a paved botanical garden path beside a low stone wall, lush green foliage and blooming white flowers behind her, sunny daytime with medium-shallow depth of field and soft bokeh.

Pose and framing: medium three-quarter portrait from head to mid-thigh, natural eye-level camera, 50–85mm portrait compression. Subject centered slightly to the right with looking room to the left. Body is turned three-quarters away from camera, rear 3/4 view: torso angled about 135 degrees away, back and right side mostly toward camera. She turns her head back over her left shoulder to look directly into the lens. Arms crossed gently in front at lower waist; left arm bent across waist, right hand lightly touching/resting on the left forearm sleeve near the elbow with relaxed delicate fingers. Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 full-body lifestyle portrait of an adult East Asian woman age 18-22 with fair skin, realistic human proportions, centered in a clean minimal studio or simple modern interior with a plain light seamless background. Style: clean commercial fashion snapshot, realistic, slightly desaturated cool-toned palette, soft fine grain.

Subject: calm neutral unbothered expression, no smile, relaxed straight eyebrows, slightly heavy-lidded eyes, irises looking directly into the camera with centered sclera, lips naturally closed and relaxed, jaw neutral, facial muscles relaxed. Minimal natural makeup: smooth soft matte skin, thin natural upper lash line, subtle warm neutral eyeshadow, light mascara, natural soft rosy nude matte lips, soft natural blush, no jewelry.

Hair: light ash blonde with cool undertones, mid-chest length, long straight A-line silhouette falling naturally, flat crown with organic volume in mid-lengths and ends, sparse straight see-through fr

images.note:
Photorealistic vertical 9:16 full-body outdoor lifestyle fashion portrait of a young adult East Asian woman, age 18–24, fair skin with natural warm daylight highlights and realistic skin texture. She stands centered against a smooth light-grey industrial concrete wall with faint weathering and seam lines. Full body from head to toe, eye-level/slightly waist-height camera, 50mm look, deep focus f/8, crisp subject and wall.

Expression and gaze: calm, serene, approachable, gentle faint closed-mouth smile, relaxed eyebrows, soft relaxed eyelids, both irises aligned looking directly into the camera, head perfectly upright facing front with neutral chin, no head tilt. Natural everyday makeup: smooth satin skin, subtle peach neutral eyeshadow, thin upper-lash eyeliner, light mascara, soft peachy coral satin lips, gentle warm blush, subtle cheekbone glow.

Hair: long straight deep natural dark brown hair with subtle warm chestnut highlights, falling past shoulders to mid-chest over the front

black sleeveless fit-and-flare mini dress, fitted bodice, sweetheart neckline, white scalloped lace ruffle trim along the neckline, corset-style lace-up front with white ribbon, thin shoulder straps, sleeveless, high waist, wide white sash belt tied into a bow at the front, flowing A-line mini skirt, lightweight sheer black chiffon fabric, single-layer skirt, delicate embroidered-style floral pattern concentrated around the lower half of the skirt, dense small flowers in red, white, pale pink, muted blue, and green foliage, white scalloped lace ruffle sewn directly to the skirt hem, no underskirt, no layered hem, airy, elegant romantic cottagecore style, black ankle-strap block heel sandals, closed almond toe, matte leather, slim white piping, small white bow on the vamp, medium block heels, delicate silver filigree drop earrings, fine silver necklace with a small oval pendant, thin silver bracelet with blue gemstone beads, simple silver ring

images.note:
Create a full-body, high-resolution fashion editorial portrait of an adult East Asian woman with soft natural makeup and long dark hair, elegant romantic cottagecore styling, standing in a sunlit flower garden. She wears a black sleeveless fit-and-flare mini dress with a fitted bodice, sweetheart neckline, thin shoulder straps, high waist, and lightweight sheer black chiffon fabric. Add white scalloped lace ruffle trim sewn along the neckline. The front of the bodice has corset-style lace-up detailing with a white ribbon. At the waist is a wide white sash belt tied into a bow at the front. The skirt is a flowing A-line mini skirt, single-layer with no underskirt and no layered hem, airy and translucent-looking but modestly styled. The lower half of the skirt has a delicate embroidered-style floral pattern with dense small flowers in red, white, pale pink, muted blue, and green foliage. Add white scalloped lace ruffle sewn directly to the skirt hem.

Footwear: black ankle-strap block he

images.note:
Photorealistic vintage editorial portrait, vertical 3:4 close bust shot of an adult East Asian-presenting woman age 20-25 in an ornate monochromatic mint-green baroque studio setting. Full frontal face, chest and shoulders nearly square to camera, eye-level to slightly above, 85-100mm portrait compression. Quiet calm direct gaze into camera, both irises aligned straight forward, relaxed adult eyelids, serene composed expression, no smile, soft rosy glossy lips parted only 1-2mm with no teeth, relaxed jaw and smooth facial muscles.

Fair skin with pale mint-green ambient cast, realistic skin texture, luminous cool mint-white highlights on forehead, nose bridge, upper cheeks, lips and upper chest; cooler muted green-gray shadows under bangs, lower face and neck, directional polished artificial light from upper front-right, soft-to-medium falloff, glossy highlights but no blown-out skin.

Short glossy deep black-brown layered bob around jawline to upper neck, rounded compact silhouette, m

images.note:
Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 outdoor lifestyle portrait, cinematic daylight. A young adult woman (18–24), fair-skinned Caucasian or East Asian appearance, sits by a sparkling deep blue sea on a clear sunny day. She is positioned on the right vertical third at the lower right of frame, body in near full side profile facing left, seated with knees softly drawn up under a long flowing powder-blue maxi skirt, hands lightly resting together in her lap. Waist-up medium portrait from eye level slightly above seated height, 50–85mm natural portrait compression. Leave the entire left two-thirds as negative space of deep blue ocean with thousands of intense sun reflections and circular specular bokeh.

Face and expression: full side profile turned 90 degrees left, chin level, head vertical, irises aligned and gazing horizontally left toward the distant horizon; sclera mostly visible on the right side of the eyes. Quietly mesmerized, serene, contemplative, inward, relaxed and captivated;

images.note:
Photorealistic cinematic fashion lifestyle portrait, vertical 9:16. Adult East Asian woman in her 20s with fair skin and realistic natural skin texture, calm confident subtly playful expression, relaxed heavy-lidded eyes, direct gaze into the camera, faint closed-mouth smile. Eye-level to very slightly low fashion angle, respectful non-sexual composition, three-quarter portrait from head to knees with natural proportions and realistic anatomy.

Hair: chin-length layered bob, deep near-black brown with subtle warm brunette highlights, rounded volume at crown, airy textured layers, wispy see-through bangs just below eyebrows, side hair softly framing cheeks, subtle flyaways and natural glossy strands. Thin round metallic wire-rimmed glasses with slight warm amber reflections. Makeup: polished everyday soft glam, thin black upper eyeliner with subtle wing, warm neutral brown eyeshadow, light mascara, soft peachy-pink satin lips, soft peach blush, subtle cheekbone highlight.

Wardrobe: ele

prompts.title: 빨간망토
prompts.text:
Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 close-up studio portrait inspired by a quiet fairytale. Subject is a young adult East Asian woman, age 18-22, fair smooth porcelain skin with realistic subtle skin texture, minimal natural makeup, soft rosy satin lips, very soft pink blush, thin natural upper lash eyeliner, subtle warm neutral eyeshadow. She wears a large deep crimson red hooded cloak draped naturally over her head and tied at the neck with a ribbon bow, framing her face; underneath is a modest high-collared charcoal black gothic-vintage tunic/dress with white trim and small front buttons visible at upper chest.

Hair: long deep near-black soft brown hair, silky smooth, straight, falling past shoulders under the hood; dense blunt bangs at eyebrow level with slight natural imperfection and longer temples, face-framing layers, a few fine flyaways, realistic strands and shine.

Expression and pose: close-up head-to-upper-chest portrait, body angled about 30 degrees with left shoulder slightly closer to camera, relaxed shoulders under cloak. Head chin slightly lifted, face turned slightly viewer-right with a subtle viewer-right roll. She looks slightly upward and off-camera to the viewer's right with both irises aligned naturally, relaxed eyelids, soft unfocused contemplative gaze. Brows relaxed with gentle curiosity. Lips parted softly 3-5mm, no smile, mouth corners relaxed. Right hand raised; index finger lightly rests against lower lip, other fingers softly curled, hand proportional and anatomically correct, no jewelry, realistic fingernails, delicate involuntary gesture.

Lighting and scene: bright minimal pure white studio backdrop, clean negative space, no background elements. Soft natural diffused light from 10 o'clock slightly above; cool neutral-white lit side, shallow warm-neutral shadow side, gradual transitions defining cheeks and jaw, soft ambient occlusion inside hood, gentle eye catchlights and hair sheen. 85-105mm flattering compression, centered composition, eyes on upper third, shallow depth of field but flat clean background. Color palette deep crimson red, charcoal black, pure white, natural skin tones; clean high-key daylight, soft contrast, rich natural red fabric texture.

Avoid: anime, cartoon, illustration, CGI, render, stylized face, oversized eyes, exaggerated cute expression, smile, heavy makeup, glamour styling, over-smoothed plastic skin, overexposed skin, flat even lighting, harsh strobe, clutter, text, watermark, logo, bad anatomy, elongated neck, distorted shoulders, deformed hand, extra or missing fingers, fingers merging with lips, unrealistic proportions, stiff plastic fabric, floating fabric.

images.note:
Photorealistic bright outdoor summer lifestyle portrait, vertical 9:16. Full-body adult woman age 18–25 with fair warm peachy skin, realistic human proportions, standing perfectly centered in a classic stone cloister / arched outdoor corridor under hanging purple wisteria. Low-angle camera from about 3–4m away, full body visible from wide-brimmed straw hat to beige-and-white strappy wedge sandals. Subject faces fully front, torso and face parallel to camera, chin slightly lowered, looking slightly downward directly at the camera with a soft clear relaxed gaze; serene warm quietly joyful expression, very faint closed-mouth smile, relaxed brows and jaw.

She wears a warm ivory-white sleeveless romantic sundress: v-neckline, button-down front, subtle floral embroidery along edges, gathered waist, midi flared flowy skirt, slightly translucent at hem in backlight. She holds both sides of the dress skirt delicately outward with fingertips, arms down and slightly outward, elbows relaxed; hand

Use the two provided reference images only for realistic facial features, soft direct gaze, and delicate mouth/hand expression, but transform the styling and scene completely.

Subject: centered slightly right, waist-up/bust shot, body angled away in rear 3/4 with back mostly toward camera, torso axis about 135 degrees, looking back over her left shoulder directly into the camera. Head turned left over shoulder with neutral pitch and slight roll into shoulder; neck twist anatomically natural, not stretched. Expression softly alluring and calm: relaxed softly arched brows visible beneath bangs, heavy relaxed upper eyelids, both irises aligned toward camera, lips softly parted 2–3 mm with a very faint warmth at mouth corners, jaw relaxed. Right hand raised with relaxed natural joints, curled inward, fingertips resting delicately on lower lip/chin; glossy deep red nail polish. Hand proportional, no finger deformities.

Hair: long deep near-black, extremely glossy, silky straight, hime cut. Dense straight blunt bangs grazing upper eyelids with no visible part, smooth cheek-level face-framing side pieces, long back draping past shoulders, flat crown, blunt ends, minimal flyaways. Left ear partly visible with a refined earring. Add an intricate sprawling woven golden hairpiece wrapping around the head and integrating with roses, elegant vine-like structure.

Wardrobe: deep black dark-romantic gothic botanical lace dress, high ruffled lace neck collar, black lace ruffles, sheer sleeve panels with delicate golden vine embroidery. Rich realistic lace and fabric texture.

Scene: dense floral arrangement of abundant blooming orange-red roses tightly surrounding and framing her, especially a large rose border along the left edge. Delicate golden vine-like accents weave through the flowers and hairpiece. Minimal negative space, richly layered floral background, subject foreground sharp with background roses softly blurred.

Subtle warm bounce light from orange/red roses on skin. Rich specular highlights on glossy black hair and red nails. No harsh sun, no studio strobe, no overexposed skin.

images.note:
Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 indoor lifestyle portrait of an adult East Asian woman, age 20–28, fair skin, standing inside a high-rise apartment/office beside a floor-to-ceiling glass window. High-angle close bust shot from about 0.5–1m away, camera above her looking slightly down while she leans forward into the frame and tilts her chin/head upward, looking directly upward into the lens. Body 3/4 front, torso angled about 30 degrees, shoulders relaxed, mid-torso to just above head framing, eyes near upper third. Realistic perspective and anatomy: head proportional, neck naturally extended but not elongated, visible collarbones and subtle neck tendons under light, realistic fabric gravity and foreshortening.

Expression: quietly attentive, gentle, serene, subtly warm. Eyes open naturally with relaxed eyelids, irises aligned upward toward camera, slightly more sclera below iris than above. Relaxed neutral eyebrows slightly lifted only from upward gaze. Lips naturally closed, so

images.note:
Create a photorealistic vertical 3:4 rainy outdoor lifestyle portrait. Adult East Asian woman, age 20–28, fair skin with cool blue-gray cast from overcast rainy daylight and subtle natural rosiness. She stands beside a rainy roadside / bridge-side walkway next to wet asphalt, guardrail, distant greenery, and softly blurred cars with creamy headlights reflecting on the road. Mood calm, melancholic, soft, contemplative.

Composition: waist-up to upper-thigh medium-close portrait, subject slightly right of center with negative space on the left in the direction of her gaze. Natural eye-level to very slightly low angle, 50mm look, shallow-to-medium depth of field. Transparent clear dome umbrella arcs across the upper frame, visible ribs, black shaft, white handle, many rain droplets catching cool light. Subject and umbrella sharp, background misty gray-blue rainy bokeh.

Pose and anatomy: clean left-facing side profile, body axis 80–90 degrees to camera, torso upright and mostly side-on, s

Photorealistic vertical 3:4 rainy outdoor lifestyle portrait, quiet emotional urban roadside mood. An adult East Asian woman in her 20s stands slightly right of center on a rainy roadside or bridge-side walkway beside a wet road. She is shown in a natural left-facing side profile, torso mostly side-on, looking off-camera left slightly upward into the rainy distance. Her expression is calm, inward, contemplative, slightly wistful: relaxed brows, softly open heavy-lidded eyes, aligned gaze, lips gently parted, no smile, relaxed jaw.

She has fair skin with a cool blue-gray cast from overcast daylight and subtle natural rosiness in cheeks and lips. Realistic skin texture, minimal natural makeup, soft beige-brown eye shading, light mascara, natural rosy satin lips. Her hair is deep dark brown, nearly black in shadow, gathered into a loose low bun at the nape with wispy see-through bangs and soft face-framing strands near the cheek and jaw, slightly damp with fine flyaways from humid rain.

images.note:
Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 studio fashion portrait of an adult East Asian woman, age 20-28, fair skin with realistic soft matte texture. Medium three-quarter shot from head to upper thighs, centered, eyes near upper third, clean neutral light grey seamless backdrop, minimalist modern indoor studio, no distracting elements.

She stands confidently in a 3/4 front pose, body angled slightly right about 30 degrees, weight shifted to one leg, upright relaxed shoulders with slight hip tilt. Left hand tucked naturally into the pocket of her pants; right arm extended downward holding a closed dark navy-blue umbrella with a classic curved handle, parallel to her body axis, handle near hip. Natural hand anatomy and relaxed grip.

Expression: composed and slightly aloof, quiet confidence, chin subtly lifted, head turned marginally left, neutral relaxed mouth with a very faint smirk, closed lips, relaxed brows with slight natural arch. Gaze direct and aligned, looking slightly downward

images.note:
Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 outdoor lifestyle portrait of an adult East Asian woman, age 20–28, standing beside a bicycle on a wet paved bike path along a wide river in an urban park. Full body visible, medium-far distance about 3–4m, very slight low angle but natural eye-level feel, 35–50mm environmental portrait, subject centered with bicycle occupying lower half of frame. Overhanging green tree branches frame the top corners; river, bridge, distant city skyline and hills in softly blurred background; bright daytime sky with soft clouds; wet asphalt reflecting the sky.

Subject: fair skin with healthy natural glow, realistic skin texture, minimal natural makeup. Calmly cheerful confident expression: relaxed neutral slightly arched brows, naturally open bright eyes looking directly into camera with centered irises, equal sclera, relaxed eyelids; soft natural smile with lips slightly parted and a little teeth visible, relaxed jaw. Friendly, open, approachable energy.

Hair: l

images.note:
Photorealistic vertical 9:16 full-body casual lifestyle portrait of an adult East Asian woman, age 18–25, fair skin with warm undertones and visible natural skin texture. She is seated on a clean light-colored floor, back leaning comfortably against a plain off-white/beige wall in a minimalist indoor corner. Body angled about 30 degrees to camera, chest and face mostly open; legs extended forward with knees softly bent, feet closer to camera but realistically proportioned, no wide-angle distortion. Arms rest loosely at sides/lap, hands mostly hidden inside oversized hoodie sleeves. Head faces forward with a very slight tilt toward her right shoulder, looking directly into the camera with perfectly aligned irises, relaxed eyelids, calm soft gaze, subtle closed-mouth genuine smile, relaxed brows and jaw.

Hair: medium-to-dark warm brown with subtle chestnut highlights, tied back into a relaxed low bun at the nape, natural slightly right-of-center soft part, loose wispy chin-length face-f

SCENE:
明るい白壁の室内、右上に大きな窓があり、外の木漏れ日が差し込むナチュラルなベッドルーム風空間。白と淡いベージュで統一された清潔感のある背景。朝〜昼の柔らかな生活感。

MOVEMENT / FACIAL EXPRESSION:
ミカはカメラの近くに立ち、上半身をわずかに前へ寄せる。両手で白いシャツの裾を左右に持ち、軽く持ち上げて、布のたるみと動きを自然に見せる。肩は力を抜き、片側の腰を少し落として、リラックスしたS字ラインを作る。視線はカメラをまっすぐ捉え、表情は穏やかで静かな親密さ。口元は緩んでおり、微笑む直前のような柔らかいニュアンス。作り込みすぎず、自然光の中でふとこちらを見た瞬間のような雰囲気。

SKIN / TEXTURE:
明るくなめらかな肌質。過度なレタッチは避け、腹部や頬に自然なハイライトを残す。肌は健康的で透明感があり、光を受けた部分に柔らかなツヤ。

OUTFIT / STYLING:
白のゆったりしたサテン調シャツは、光沢のある薄手の生地で、裾にかけて自然なシワとドレープが出ている。両手で裾を持ち上げることで布が横方向に張り、柔らかな曲線を作る。ボトムスは白のドローストリング付きラウンジパンツ。ウエストはゴム仕様で、中央に結び紐が垂れる。全体は白のワントーンで、清潔感、リラックス感、上品な部屋着スタイルを強調。

HAIR:
暗めのセミロングヘア。ゆるいウェーブで、顔まわりに細い後れ毛がかかる。トップは自然にふんわりし、窓からの逆光で毛先が透ける。

LIGHTING:
右上の窓から強めの自然光。逆光気味で髪とシャツの輪郭が明るく光り、室内全体は白く柔らかいハイキー調。淡いレンズフレアと空気感。

CAMERA:
縦長ポートレート。ややローアングル気味の近距離撮影で、胸上から腰まわりまでを中心に構図化。広角寄りだが歪みは控えめ。浅い被写界深度。

STYLE / QUALITY:
超フォトリアリスティック、自然光ポートレート、8K、高精細、柔らかな肌表現、白基調、透明感、生活感のある上品なルームウェア写真。

SCENE:    
白〜淡いブルーを基調にしたファッション誌風のクリーンなスタジオ背景。顔、肩、グレーの衣装が映える上品でミニマルなファッション撮影空間。    
    
MOVEMENT / FACIAL EXPRESSION:    
ミカが身体を斜め後ろ向きにし、肩越しにこちらを振り返る瞬間。片腕を頭上にゆるく上げ、手先を髪の近くに添える。もう片方の肩は自然に落とし、首筋から肩のラインがきれいに見える姿勢。背中を少し反らせ、上半身に柔らかなひねりを作る。表情は落ち着いた透明感のあるまなざしで、目はカメラをまっすぐ見つめる。唇は軽く開き、笑いすぎない静かな色気と清潔感を両立。力みのない自然なポージング。    
    
SKIN / TEXTURE:    
肌は明るくなめらかだが、過度に加工せず毛穴や頬の自然な質感を残す。肩、首、頬に柔らかなハイライト。透明感のあるナチュラルメイク、淡い血色感。    
    
OUTFIT / STYLING:    
チャコールグレーのオフショルダー風ワンピース。胸元から肩にかけてゴムシャーリングが入り、細かいギャザーで立体感を作る。袖はふんわり広がるラッフルスリーブで、腕を上げた動きに合わせて布が波打つ。肩まわりは上品に肌を見せ、首元をすっきり見せる。生地はマットで少しハリのあるコットン混素材、軽いシワと陰影を残す。背面には細いリボンやストラップの気配を入れ、甘すぎず大人っぽいフェミニンな印象。    
    
HAIR:    
暗めのスモーキーアッシュグレーのミディアムヘアを低めにまとめ、顔まわりに細い後れ毛を残す。前髪は薄く自然に散り、額と目元に柔らかくかかる。整えすぎない抜け感。    
    
LIGHTING:    
正面左上から柔らかな拡散光。影は薄く、肌と衣装の質感を自然に見せるハイキー寄りのライティング。    
    
CAMERA:    
縦構図、胸上〜腰上のクローズアップ。85mm相当のポートレートレンズ、浅い被写界深度。顔にピント、背景は自然にぼかす。    
    
STYLE / QUALITY:    
超フォトリアリスティック、透明感、清潔感、繊細な布表現、自然な肌、8K、高解像度、過度な美肌補正なし、文字崩れや不自然な手指を避ける。

Create a 9:16 vertical photorealistic cinematic street portrait, moody rainy day. An adult East Asian woman, age 20–28, fair porcelain skin with cool undertone, stands on outdoor concrete city stairs in a heavy rainstorm among a dense crowd of anonymous men in dark suits carrying identical black umbrellas. The background is richly layered with dark umbrellas and suited figures receding up the stairs, medium depth of field, background softly blurred, subject tack sharp.

Subject: waist-up medium shot, rear three-quarter pose. Her torso faces away from the camera at about 135–150 degrees, exposing an elegant bare upper back and right shoulder. She turns her head dramatically back over her right shoulder to look directly into the lens. Chin slightly lowered, head upright, natural graceful neck twist with realistic anatomy, no broken or elongated neck. Right shoulder subtly elevated and pulled back. Left arm reaches up and across to hold a classic matte crimson red umbrella over her left shoulder; black opera-gloved hand grips a curved wooden hook handle, knuckles visible, realistic hand proportions.

Face and expression: composed, aloof, serene, quietly intense. Straight relaxed brows partly hidden by bangs, relaxed upper eyelids, both irises sharply aligned toward the camera over the shoulder, more sclera visible on inner halves due to the extreme look-back. No smile, lips naturally closed, soft matte deep muted red / dark berry lips, relaxed jaw and facial muscles. Sharp precise black winged eyeliner, subtle cool neutral eyeshadow, defined lashes, smooth natural matte skin texture, subtle cool blush, no glossy lips or heavy contour.

Hair: deepest black chin-length sleek straight classic bob, rounded smooth helmet-like silhouette, blunt single-length ends curved inward at jaw and neck, heavy dense blunt fringe cut at or just above eyebrow level, no visible part, ears fully covered, immaculately smooth and glossy, no flyaways, no waves, no frizz.

Wardrobe: elegant deep black evening dress with sweetheart neckline, low back, thin straps, ruffled detailing along bustline, fitted bodice, matching fitted lower dress not fully visible. Long black opera gloves. Accessories: thick black velvet choker plus multi-layered white pearl necklace with varying pearl sizes and a long drop pendant. Striking matte red umbrella canopy above, covered with visible raindrops.

Lighting and color: soft diffused overcast daylight from above, heavy rain ambience, cool muted shadows under chin and along back, very soft transitions. High contrast cinematic color grade: desaturated charcoal blacks and concrete grays, pale cool porcelain skin, single bold saturated matte crimson umbrella and matching lips. Subtle film grain, crisp photorealistic street photography. Eye-level camera, 50mm lens look, face near upper third, umbrella filling upper half, claustrophobic background of gray stairs, men in suits, black umbrellas.

Ensure realistic proportions: anatomically proportional head size, natural neck thickness and length, realistic shoulders and torso twist, realistic arm and hand holding umbrella. Avoid: smile, parted lips, exaggerated emotion, cute/playful expression, glamour studio lighting, warm golden hour, harsh sunlight, overexposed or plastic skin, anime/cartoon/illustration/CGI, oversized eyes, broken neck, twisted spine, dislocated shoulder, extra or missing fingers, deformed hands, watermarks, text, logos.

Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 outdoor lifestyle portrait of an adult East Asian woman (18-24) standing in side profile, left side of face and body toward camera, drinking from a clear crinkled plastic water bottle. Bust/waist-up close-medium framing, slight low angle looking up against a clean vivid blue sky with scattered fluffy white clouds. Bright summer aesthetic, commercial candid snapshot.

Subject: fair skin with realistic texture, warm direct sunlight highlights on nose tip, forehead, chin and cheek, cool blue-toned crisp shadows on neck and back of jaw. Calm refreshed neutral expression: relaxed brow, eyes open naturally with irises aligned upward-forward toward the bottle, more sclera visible below, no smile, lips parted naturally around the bottle mouthpiece, jaw slightly dropped. Natural minimal makeup only: light glowing skin, soft peach flush, natural soft pink moist lips, subtle lash definition, no heavy eyeliner.

Hair: natural dark brown/soft black long hair tied into a casual high ponytail, loose face-framing side pieces past chin, soft wisps over temples and cheeks, left ear visible, natural crown volume, silky fine strands and flyaways catching sunlight and breeze, not slicked.

Wardrobe: oversized light gray/white hoodie, relaxed baggy fabric, drawstrings visible, partial dark graphic text on chest (not readable), simple black nylon backpack straps over shoulders. No heavy jewelry.

Pose/anatomy: torso near profile with slight front twist, upright relaxed posture, head facing left in full profile, chin slightly lifted, neck realistically extended to drink, right arm raised with elbow bent sharply, right hand realistically gripping the center of the clear crinkled water bottle angled upward, bottle touching lips. Natural hand proportions, realistic fingers around bottle, visible transparency, water refraction and caustic highlights. Subject centered filling lower two-thirds, face upper center, open sky above and to left.

Lighting: hard directional sunlight from upper front-left, high contrast but not overexposed, crisp shadows, bright rim light on hair strands. 50mm lens feel, medium depth of field, sky clear but slightly soft. Color grading clean bright daylight, high-key, vivid sky blue, cloud white, light gray hoodie, natural skin tones.

Avoid: glamour studio portrait, heavy makeup, jewelry, bare shoulders, frontal pose, smile, exaggerated cute expression, anime/cartoon/CGI/render/illustration, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, overexposed texture loss, flat lighting, cluttered background, logos, readable text, watermark, distorted profile, elongated neck, bad anatomy, extra/missing/mangled fingers, merged bottle and mouth, unrealistic water physics.

images.note: Create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 outdoor lifestyle portrait, bust/waist-up close-medium framing from a slight low angle. An adult East Asian woman age 18-24 stands in side profile with the left side of her face and body toward the camera, centered in the lower two-thirds of the frame, face in the upper center, open vivid blue sky and scattered fluffy white clouds above and to the left. She is drinking from a clear crinkled plastic water bottle: head facing left in full profile, chin slightly lifted, neck naturally extended, calm refreshed neutral expression with relaxed brow, eyes open naturally and irises aligned upward-forward toward the bottle, more sclera visible below, no smile, lips parted naturally around the bottle mouthpiece, jaw slightly dropped. Right arm raised with elbow sharply bent; right hand realistically grips the center of the transparent crinkled bottle angled upward, bottle touching lips, natural hand proportions and fingers, visible water refraction, caustic

prompts.text: A realistic vertical 9:16 close-range smartphone portrait, shot from a strong overhead angle. An adult woman is sitting or crouching indoors under soft natural light, with the camera placed above her at roughly a 55 to 70 degree angle as she looks upward directly into the lens. The image focuses on her rounded dark-brown eyes, visible center hair part, soft airy bangs, and a white cotton fabric covering her lower face and upper body. Her mouth is not visible, and the fabric mutes the expression, leaving only a quiet, restrained, slightly guarded gaze.  She has dark brown, almost black, fine soft hair with a realistic visible scalp part, slightly separated bangs, small flyaways, and natural softness. Her makeup follows a natural East Asian social-media style: soft straight brows, light brown eyeliner, subtle under-eye shadow, low-saturation peach-pink blush, and clean base makeup without excessive smoothing. Her skin tone is fair warm ivory with a faint peach-pink flush on the cheeks, arms, and hands. Visible skin includes the forehead, eye area, upper cheeks, shoulder edges, upper arms, forearms, hands, and a softly blurred partial leg area near the lower frame; chest, waist, hips, and buttocks should remain hidden. The skin should look delicate, soft, matte, and touchably cotton-smooth, with natural tone variation and no plastic finish.  Both hands hold a soft white cotton cloth or towel from below, pulling it up near the mouth and nose. The cloth has natural wrinkles, slightly thick soft edges, and a faint fuzzy surface. It acts as both foreground concealment and a physical reflector, bouncing milky white fill light onto the face, arms, and hands. Lighting comes from a large diffused natural source from the upper-front or front-left direction, with no harsh shadows and no commercial studio rim light. The background is a simple warm beige or pale cream private indoor space with very few details, possibly a blurred dark vertical furniture edge in the upper-left area.  Keep the image authentic and casual: mild smartphone compression, soft focus, low sharpness, slightly overexposed whites, shallow depth of field, blurred lower-frame legs and background, imperfect cropping, messy hair strands, fabric wrinkles, and accidental framing. She had just pulled the white cloth up to her face and paused for a second; she is still looking into the lens, and in the next moment she might hide her face even more. Avoid underage appearance, sexualized posing, exposed chest, school uniforms, lingerie, exaggerated influencer face, excessive retouching, plastic skin, harsh studio lighting, anime style, text, watermark, and logos.
