Create a photorealistic bright lifestyle snapshot in a 9:16 vertical portrait, full body, adult East Asian woman age 18–24, fair skin with natural daylight highlights. She is centered in a clean minimalist white/light grey studio or minimal outdoor street background, shallow-to-medium depth of field, bright diffused natural daylight from top-front with soft bounce and gentle hair highlights.

Subject pose: rear three-quarter view with body turned about 135 degrees away from camera, back/shoulder toward camera, turning sharply back over her right shoulder to face camera. Natural anatomical neck twist, right shoulder slightly elevated, torso twist realistic. One leg slightly forward. Left arm hangs down holding a simple black rectangular shoulder/messenger bag by its strap. Right arm raised with a relaxed peace sign about 10 cm from her face. Lively mid-motion candid feeling.

Expression and gaze: joyful, playful wink and broad genuine smile. Left eye tightly closed in a clean wink; right eye open and looking directly at camera, iris centered with even sclera. Relaxed slightly lifted brows. Mouth open about 1–2 cm, teeth visible, high lifted smile corners, engaged cheeks. Avoid forced or exaggerated expression.

Hair: collarbone-length light ash blonde / silvery grey straight layered A-line cut, soft center part, wispy see-through bangs at eyebrow level, face-framing layers, point-cut ends. Silky glossy fine strands, light natural volume, dynamic sweep and subtle flyaways from the turn. Left ear exposed, right ear partially covered.

Makeup: soft everyday natural makeup, smooth light coverage with realistic skin texture, subtle warm neutral eyeshadow, thin natural eyeliner, light mascara, soft rosy pink satin lips, natural blush and subtle glow. No heavy glam.

Wardrobe: oversized short-sleeve hoodie in white and light grey with drawstrings, layered over a sheer lace-sleeve top showing delicate lace texture on inner sleeves. Tiered ruffle midi skirt, flowing feminine bohemian style. Low black ankle socks, chunky black and grey modern athletic sneakers. Simple black shoulder bag. Casual layered streetwear with feminine chic details.

Camera/composition: natural eye-level, 50mm look, full body visible from about 2m, eyes near upper third, clean negative space, subject sharp, bright clean commercial lifestyle processing. Realistic fabric textures and anatomy, proportional head about 1/7 body height, realistic hands and fingers.

Negative: anime, cartoon, illustration, digital painting, CGI, 3D render, stylized face, oversized eyes, eye highlight orbs, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, overexposed skin, heavy makeup, glamour styling, studio strobe, harsh high contrast shadows, flat lighting, cluttered background, watermark, logo, text, bad anatomy, broken or elongated neck, unnatural head rotation, distorted torso twist, disproportionate head, mangled/deformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted arms or legs, foreshortening artifacts.

Natural anatomical neck twist, right shoulder slightly elevated, torso twist realistic. One leg slightly forward. Left arm hangs down holding a simple black rectangular shoulder/messenger bag by its strap. Right arm raised with a relaxed peace sign about 10 cm from her face.

images.note:
Using the attached reference image as the sole identity reference, create a photorealistic vertical 9:16 outdoor lifestyle portrait of the exact same adult East Asian woman with very high identity preservation and recognizable likeness. Preserve facial structure, proportions, eye shape and spacing, eyelids, brows, nose, lips, cheek contour, jawline, chin, forehead proportion, skin tone, and natural facial asymmetry. Do not redesign or beautify into a different person.

Scene: coastal road or beachfront walkway at sunset. She is seated sideways on a thick metal guardrail, full body visible, legs dangling naturally with knees slightly bent, white slightly scrunched ankle socks and chunky white retro running sneakers with light grey details. Body faces away in a rear 3/4 angle, receding along the guardrail for depth, while her head turns back naturally over her right shoulder to look directly into the camera. Neck and shoulders must be anatomically correct and relaxed. Hands rest casually

prompts.title: 도시 속 청춘, 그래피티 벽 앞
prompts.text:
1. GENERATION_PROMPT

**1. Identity Source**
Use the newly attached reference image as the sole facial identity reference. Preserve only that person's intrinsic facial identity: facial structure, natural asymmetry, eye shape, nose, lips, cheek contour, jawline, chin, and skin tone behavior. Do not copy that reference image's hair color, hairstyle, accessories, clothing, background, pose, expression, gaze, lighting, camera angle, or styling. Do not copy or blend the facial identity from the source reference image(s) used to create this prompt.

**2. Overall Image**
Photorealistic medium portrait of a young woman leaning against a graffiti wall. Casual, edgy urban streetwear aesthetic with a cool, modern mood.

**3. Head / Gaze / Camera Lock**
Keep the same head-and-gaze geometry: the head is tilted slightly to camera-right with a neutral chin, eyes locked in direct camera contact, camera positioned at mid-chest height at a medium distance, with the subject centered and framed from the upper thighs up.

**4. Expression / Eye Mood**
Calm, neutral, and slightly serious. Relaxed eyelids, resting unparted lips, and a soft but direct, unguarded gaze.

**5. Pose / Body Geometry**
Standing naturally, upper back leaning gently against a wall. Shoulders relaxed, torso facing the camera directly. Arms rest straight down at the sides, slightly pushing back an open jacket. Hips display a subtle, natural tilt.

**6. Framing / Lens / Crop**
Medium shot cropped from the upper thighs up. Subject is perfectly centered. Standard portrait lens (approx. 50mm) with moderate depth of field, keeping the subject in sharp focus and the immediate background wall clear but slightly separated.

**7. Hair / Styling**
Long, voluminous, wavy teal/aquamarine hair with soft bangs and face-framing curtain pieces, cascading gracefully over the shoulders. Glossy texture. Styled with a slim black headband with a small gold cross detail. Wardrobe: tight white tube crop top, oversized open black leather motorcycle jacket with slight distressing and an arm patch, and heavily distressed blue denim cut-off shorts. Accessories: thin black choker with a teal diamond-shaped gem, delicate gold necklace with a matching gem, and dangling teal gem earrings.

**8. Lighting / Color Behavior**
Soft, diffused ambient lighting simulating bright overcast daylight. Even illumination across the face and body with no harsh shadows. Gentle drop shadows occur under the jacket collar, chest, and against the back wall. High color vibrancy, especially highlighting the teal hair and bright background graphics.

**9. Scene / Color Grade / Atmosphere**
Urban setting featuring a light grey concrete wall heavily tagged with vibrant, saturated graffiti (pink, purple, blue text and drips) and faint marker scribbles. Cool, contemporary color grade emphasizing the contrast between the black leather and colorful environment.

**10. Realism Guardrails**
Strictly photorealistic. Render authentic skin textures, natural hair flyaways, accurate leather sheen, and realistic denim weave. Maintain correct human anatomy, torso proportions, and realistic structural weight. Avoid all illustrated, anime, or 3D aesthetics.

---

2. NEGATIVE_PROMPT

**Identity drift:**

* different person from newly attached identity reference
* copied face from source reference image(s)
* blended face between identity reference and source reference image(s)
* generic AI face
* altered facial features
* changed ethnic or regional facial features

**Identity-reference leakage:**

* copied accessories from identity reference
* copied glasses or jewelry from identity reference
* copied clothing from identity reference
* copied hair color or hairstyle from identity reference
* copied background from identity reference
* copied pose, expression, gaze, camera angle, or lighting from identity reference

**Head / gaze errors:**

* wrong head angle
* wrong gaze direction
* mismatched head and eye direction
* crossed eyes
* wall-eyed gaze
* misaligned irises
* rolled eyes
* dead eyes
* doll-like stare

**Anatomy and pose errors:**

* distorted neck
* twisted shoulders
* unnatural head rotation
* bad anatomy
* unrealistic proportions
* distorted limbs
* deformed hands
* extra fingers
* missing fingers
* foreshortening artifacts

**Rendering errors:**

* plastic skin
* over-smoothed skin
* waxy face
* CGI
* 3D render
* anime
* illustration
* cartoon
* watermark
* logo

**Scene-specific negatives:**

* dark lighting
* indoor studio setup
* plain or solid color background
* conservative or formal clothing
* tied-up hair or short hair

Create:
A coherent photorealistic portrait of a young woman standing against a bright, abstract pink and white geometric background.

Use reference image(s) as:
The primary identity and styling reference. The stylized anime reference must be beautifully translated into a believable, lifelike photorealistic human while faithfully retaining her unique character design and recognizable features.

Preserve:
Facial identity, soft jawline, natural facial asymmetry, and fair skin tone. Strictly preserve her iconic hairstyle: a straight blonde chin-length bob with delicate see-through bangs and vibrant pink dip-dyed ends. Retain the black cross drop earrings exactly as they appear.

Subject:
A young adult woman with striking reddish-brown eyes, dressed in an oversized black hoodie worn as a dress. The hoodie features an integrated hood with physical cat ears, worn up over her head. Her bare legs are partially visible below the hoodie's hem. Her makeup is soft and natural, featuring a smooth base with a distinct, warm pink blush across her upper cheeks and a natural satin lip.

Expression and gaze:
A gentle, affectionate, and quiet smile. She looks directly into the camera lens with a warm, relaxed gaze. Her eyelids are soft, and her head, eye direction, and camera angle are perfectly and naturally aligned.

Pose and anatomy:
Standing upright and facing the camera directly. Her arms are drawn downward with her hands gently clasped together resting naturally in front of her lower torso. Shoulders are relaxed, supporting realistic human anatomy, accurate limb proportions, and a natural neck connection.

Camera and composition:
Vertical aspect ratio framing a three-quarter portrait (mid-thigh up). Shot at eye-level with a flattering 50mm lens feel. The subject is perfectly centered in the frame, utilizing the bold geometric background as negative space. A medium depth of field ensures the subject remains perfectly sharp while creating a soft separation from the background.

Lighting and color:
Bright, crisp directional sunlight originating from the upper left, casting natural and distinct shadows across the right side of her face and the deep folds of the hoodie. The lighting creates a beautiful rim-light effect on her blonde hair. The color grading is vivid and high-contrast, perfectly balancing the deep black of the hoodie, the warm blonde hair, and the striking pink accents.

Rendering quality:
Masterful photorealism. Highly detailed, true-to-life skin texture with natural translucency, physically accurate and fine individual hair strands, realistic cotton fabric drape on the hoodie, flawless anatomical fidelity, and a cinematic real-camera aesthetic.

Avoid:
Identity drift, different person, generic AI face, face alteration, altered ethnic facial features, overly cute exaggerated expression, forced smile, wide-eyed artificial look, blank doll-like stare, crossed eyes, wall-eyed gaze, rolled eyes, misaligned irises, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, overexposed skin, head too large, head too small, disproportionate head, elongated neck, neck distortion, unnatural head rotation, bad anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, distorted arms, distorted legs, unrealistic proportions, foreshortening artifacts, cluttered background, anime, anime style, illustration, digital painting, cartoon, CGI, 3D render, stylized eyes, oversized eyes, watermark, logo, text.

Output settings:
Aspect ratio: 9:16
Recommended size: 1024x1536
Render style: photorealistic
Identity preservation: highest priority
Quality: high

images.note:
Using the attached reference image as the identity reference, create a portrait-oriented 3:4 soft natural-light indoor portrait of the same young woman in a quiet academic library. Preserve facial identity strongly: soft oval face, delicate narrow jawline, youthful proportions, large almond-shaped bright blue eyes, fair skin, gentle scholarly presence. Show her seated waist-up at a wooden reading desk, near full frontal, body 10-15 degrees off frontal, with a very slight downward head tilt and slight turn to her right. She holds a book directly in front of her face with both hands on the outer edges, so the nose and mouth are mostly hidden behind the book; only the eyes and upper cheeks are visible above it. Expression is calm, introspective, quietly absorbed in reading, gaze slightly downward over the top edge of the book. 

Hair: waist-length to lower-back length cool pastel blue hair, long straight layered hairstyle, silky and glossy, soft center part with long wispy see-through fri

Japanese-style cool summer semi-realistic illustration, main subject is [xxx], aspect ratio 9:16, low angle shot looking up, subject occupying the center of the frame. Deep, high-saturation cobalt blue sky, a few thick white clouds, strong contrast between blue and white. Sunny hard light shining from the upper side, cool white highlights, blue-gray shadows, skin and clothing with blue ambient light reflections. Impasto combined with fine line art, delicate and visible brushstrokes. Aloof and translucent facial features, hair slightly fluttering. Loose and pure white clothing with wrinkles and cool blue reflections. Overall atmosphere is cool, quiet, lonely, free, with a sense of summer transparency, resembling high-end Japanese literature illustrations and poetry book covers. No text, no watermarks, no logos, no photographic feel, no 3D.

Do not redesign or beautify into a different person.

Strong natural daylight enters from the subject’s right side, creating warm golden highlights on the right side of her face, hair, shoulder, and skin, with cooler soft shadow on the left side and center. On her left wrist is the same elegant two-tone silver and gold watch as the reference. Her left hand rests under her chin. Strong afternoon sunlight streams from the right, casting striking dappled golden light patterns across her face, neck, and clothing. Clean white wall background with geometric window shadows. Light chestnut brown hair in a medium shag cut with textured layers and see-through bangs. She wears a white top with ruffled straps, a simple chain necklace, and multi-pendant drop earrings. On her left wrist is the same elegant two-tone silver and gold watch as the reference. Her left hand rests under her chin. Strong afternoon sunlight streams from the right, casting striking dappled golden light patterns across her face, neck, and clothing. Clean white wall background with geometric window shadows. Cinematic realism, 85mm lens look, shallow depth of field, vertical 9:16 composition.

prompts.title: 편안한 도시의 캐주얼한 스타일
prompts.text:
Photorealistic candid portrait of an adult Korean woman, [identical facial features to reference], fair skin with natural texture. Platinum-white mid-back straight hair, soft center part. Natural relaxed expression, looking directly at the camera, calm and effortless vibe. Wearing a brown ribbed bodysuit with a sweetheart neckline exposing collarbones, layered under an oversized brown faux shearling jacket worn casually open. Light-wash wide-leg denim jeans, wide camouflage patterned belt, delicate layered silver necklaces including a heart pendant, stacked silver bangles. Standing naturally, hands relaxed, completely empty hands. Clean indoor background with a simple white subway-tiled wall and dark grout, softly blurred. Soft natural daylight, candid lifestyle photography, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, cinematic soft lighting, realistic fabric and skin textures, ultra-detailed, 8k. --ar 9:16

negative_prompt: phone, holding phone, smartphone, mirror, mirror selfie, kiss mark, lip print, graphic print on wall, heavy makeup, dramatic hourglass body, highly retouched, studio flash, overexposed, artificial, plastic skin, distorted anatomy, missing fingers, extra fingers, cartoon, 3d, cgi

prompts.title: 햇살 가득한 카페에서의 평온한 순간
prompts.text: Ultra-photorealistic 8K DSLR lifestyle editorial photography. 23yo East Asian woman, ABSOLUTE FACE LOCK strictly preserving exact identity from reference, real human skin with visible pores, no beauty filters. Strict side profile portrait facing right. Gentle dreamy expression, softly focused gaze looking slightly upward, very faint relaxed smile. Subtle glossy peach-pink lips, natural makeup. Dark brown hair loosely tied back in a soft natural bun, loose face-framing strands, fine sunlit flyaways. Wearing a light beige unbuttoned linen shirt over a simple white ribbed tank top, effortless casual summer styling. Subtle gold hoop earrings, thin silver bracelet. Seated at an outdoor wooden table, left elbow resting on table, chin resting gently on back of left hand. Prominent in right foreground: tall transparent glass filled with a refreshing iced caffe latte, beautiful swirling gradient of dark espresso blending into creamy milk, visible ice cubes, condensation droplets on glass, clear straw. Lush outdoor garden cafe, leafy green canopy overhead. Strong natural summer sunlight filtering through leaves creating beautiful dappled light patterns across her face and shirt. 85mm f/1.8, extremely shallow depth of field, face and drink critically sharp, blurred foreground leaves top-left, heavily blurred creamy green bokeh background. Bright warm golden cinematic color grading, fresh and luxurious summer atmosphere.

prompts.title: Languid Golden Hour Portrait
prompts.text:
Beautiful young Korean woman with fair glowing skin, delicate facial features, large expressive dark brown eyes, natural pink lips, subtle blush, and a gentle bright smile. Long silky black hair styled in a soft half-up ponytail with airy wispy bangs and loose face-framing strands, slightly moved by a light summer breeze. 

Wearing a fitted black short-sleeve t-shirt, light blue high-waisted denim jeans, small delicate dangling earrings, and a red backpack worn over one shoulder. One hand naturally holds the backpack strap near her shoulder, the other arm rests comfortably beside her body near the wall. Hands and fingers must look anatomically correct and natural.

Standing outdoors beside a warm beige textured wall with green leaves and vines casting soft dappled shadows. Bright midday sunlight creates clean natural highlights on her hair, face, shoulders, and wall. Casual school-day street portrait mood, Korean/Japanese street photography vibe, youthful and dreamy atmosphere.

Three-quarter medium portrait composition, slightly angled body, relaxed candid pose, subject leaning lightly near the wall, off-center framing. Background shows a softly blurred sunny street with green trees, sidewalk, and subtle urban elements. Realistic skin texture, soft natural makeup, vibrant natural colors, shallow depth of field, DSLR quality, 85mm lens look, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, high-resolution editorial portrait, vertical 9:16, 8K.

Negative prompt: wedding dress, bridal outfit, flowers as main subject, awkward pose, distorted hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, unnatural arms, plastic skin, over-smoothed face, overexposed lighting, harsh shadows, low quality, blurry face, AI artifacts.

  "color_grading": {

prompts.title: Outdoor Cafe Portrait
prompts.text:
{
  "meta": {

    "aspect_ratio": "9:16",

      "gentle",

  "reference_identity": {

    "instructions": [

      "The final subject must clearly be recognizable as the same person from the reference image.",
      "Preserve facial identity above hairstyle, outfit, pose, lighting, background, and photography style.",
      "Maintain the identical facial structure: large dark eyes, soft straight nose, small slightly parted lips with natural pink tint, soft V-line jaw, and clear pale skin.",
      "Do not redesign the face.",
      "Do not beautify into a different person.",
      "Do not create a generic AI beauty face.",
      "Do not alter ethnic or regional facial features.",
      "Face identity preservation is the highest priority."
    ],
    "face_lock_keywords": [
      "same person as reference photo",
      "identical facial features",

      "recognizable likeness",
      "same eyes",
      "same nose",
      "same lips",
      "same jawline",
      "same cheek contour",
      "same facial proportions",
      "same facial structure",
      "natural facial asymmetry"
    ]
  },
  "subject": {
    "gender": "adult woman",
    "age": "18-24",
    "ethnicity": "East Asian",
    "appearance": {
      "facial_identity": "same person as attached reference image",
      "skin": "pale, clear skin with a soft matte finish in the ambient front light, showing warm golden glowing highlights on the back edge of the neck and jawline from the backlight."
    },
    "expression": {
      "emotion": "calm, gentle, and quietly inviting",
      "eyebrows": "relaxed and neutral, naturally straight, no tension or furrowing.",
      "eyelids": "eyes open naturally, upper eyelid relaxed with a very slight heavy-lidded softness, not squinting or wide-eyed.",
      "eye_direction": "irises directed straight toward the camera.",
      "lips": "slightly parted approximately 2-3mm, lower lip very slightly dropped, naturally plump.",
      "smile": "very faint soft hint of a smile, corners barely lifted in a relaxed manner.",
      "mouth_detail": "no tension at the mouth corners, lips parted effortlessly, jaw slightly dropped with no muscular engagement.",
      "jaw": "jaw relaxed and slightly dropped, consistent with parted lips, no clenching.",
      "facial_muscles": "all facial muscles fully relaxed, soft and unposed appearance.",
      "overall_impression": "candid and unguarded, capturing a natural, serene moment of resting attention.",
      "avoid": [
        "exaggerated emotion",
        "eyebrows raised too high",
        "mouth opened too wide",
        "forced or stiff smile"
      ]
    },
    "gaze": {
      "direction": "looking directly at the camera.",
      "quality": "clear and gently focused, minimal tension around the eyes, creating a soft and approachable look rather than a piercing stare.",
      "emotion": "a subtly warm and inviting gaze, quiet and unselfconscious, conveying a feeling of gentle attention with slightly relaxed focus.",
      "overall": "calm, present, and softly engaging.",
      "iris_alignment": "both irises aligned perfectly and directed straight at the camera.",
      "sclera_visibility": "iris centered, equal and minimal sclera visible on left and right sides, slightly more covered by the upper lid.",
      "gaze_body_alignment": "head faces mostly front, irises directed straight at camera; head direction and gaze are perfectly aligned, while the body is angled away."
    },
    "makeup": {
      "overall_level": "soft everyday natural",
      "skin_base": "smooth even base with a soft natural matte finish, light coverage allowing natural skin texture.",
      "eyes": {
        "eyeliner": "thin natural dark brown line along the upper lash only, very slight downward puppy-eye extension at the outer corners.",
        "eyeshadow": "subtle warm peachy-neutral on the lid and lower lash line for soft depth.",
        "mascara": "light natural lash definition, cleanly separated, not clumpy.",
        "overall_eye_makeup": "softly defined and innocent."
      },
      "lips": {
        "color": "soft warm coral-pink or rosy tint.",
        "texture": "soft satin finish, slightly moisturized but not overly glossy.",
        "overall_lip_impression": "naturally flushed and soft."
      },
      "cheeks": {
        "blush": "very soft natural peachy-pink flush lightly diffused on the apples of the cheeks.",
        "highlighter": "subtle natural glow on the bridge of the nose and inner eye corners.",
        "contour": "none or invisible."
      },
      "avoid": [
        "heavy full-coverage foundation",
        "visible cakey texture",
        "overly dramatic eye makeup",
        "dark or harsh lip colors"
      ]
    }
  },
  "hair": {
    "_priority": "Treat hair as a key identity reference element — describe with enough specificity that a hairstylist could recreate it. Every visible aspect must be captured precisely.",
    "length": "long, falling past the shoulders down to the mid-back.",
    "color": "dark brown to soft black base, catching warm golden chestnut highlights in the backlit areas.",
    "style": "straight with natural soft movement, featuring Korean-style see-through bangs and face-framing layers.",
    "overall_silhouette": "soft, layered oval silhouette, fuller at the crown and naturally draping down the shoulders.",
    "parting": "no visible clean part at the front due to bangs; softly parted off-center at the crown.",
    "layers": "face-framing layers starting from the jawline, blending softly into the longer back length.",
    "ends": "softly textured and slightly feathered, curling very subtly inward in a natural way.",
    "bangs": "Korean-style see-through bangs, thin and wispy density, falling straight down between the eyebrows and upper eyelids.",
    "side_hair": "right side (subject's right) falls forward to softly frame the cheek and jaw; left side (subject's left) is tucked cleanly behind the ear.",
    "ear_visibility": "subject's right ear is fully covered; subject's left ear is fully exposed, showing a small silver hoop earring.",
    "hair_line": "hairline not visible, fully covered by the wispy bangs.",
    "volume": "natural volume at the crown, smooth and relatively flat against the sides, maintaining a lightweight appearance.",
    "texture": "silky smooth with a healthy shine, fine individual strands visible, especially where backlit.",
    "flyaways": "visible fine, luminous flyaways around the crown and left side, beautifully illuminated by the strong backlight.",
    "condition": "healthy, smooth, and glossy throughout.",
    "movement": "mostly still, resting naturally on the shoulders with slight organic disarray from subtle movement.",
    "avoid": [
      "stiff, heavy, or blocky bangs",
      "strong curls or waves",
      "flat 2D illustrated hair texture",
      "no flyaways (which would ruin the backlight effect)"
    ]
  },
  "scene": {
    "location": "outdoor patio of a modern cafe during daytime.",
    "environment": [
      "modern cafe exterior with dark framing",
      "slatted wooden bench/table seating"
    ],
    "details": [
      "large out-of-focus round warm light fixture in the background left",
      "glass window reflecting subtle outdoor ambient light",
      "wooden slats of the bench"
    ],
    "background_rendering": {
      "complexity": "clean and not overly busy, architectural lines present but softly blurred.",
      "focus": "subject is the absolute sharp foreground center.",
      "depth": "strong bokeh blur, separating the subject distinctly from the cafe background."
    }
  },
  "wardrobe": {
    "top": {
      "type": "long-sleeve crewneck knit top",
      "color": "black and white horizontal stripes",
      "style": "sheer and casual, lightly fitted",
      "details": [
        "sheer knit fabric with slight transparency showing skin tone underneath the white stripes",
        "thin horizontal stripes",
        "sleeves pulled down to the wrists"
      ]
    },
    "bottom": {
      "type": "high-waisted tailored shorts",
      "style": "clean, elegant casual",
      "color": "solid black",
      "details": [
        "center front dark button",
        "subtle pleat details",
        "mid-thigh length"
      ]
    },
    "legwear": {
      "type": "not visible or bare legs",
      "tone": "natural fair skin tone",
      "appearance": "smooth bare skin on visible thighs"
    },
    "shoes": {
      "type": "not visible",
      "style": "n/a",
      "color": "n/a",
      "design": "n/a"
    },
    "accessories": {
      "item": "black choker necklace, large white canvas tote bag, small silver hoop earring",
      "design": "thick solid black fabric choker around the neck; simple minimalist white canvas tote bag worn over the right shoulder; simple thin silver hoop on the left ear.",
      "avoid": [
        "large statement jewelry",
        "complex patterns on the bag"
      ]
    },
    "overall_style": [
      "casual chic",
      "modern Korean street fashion",
      "clean and monochromatic with sheer textures"
    ]
  },
  "pose": {
    "description": "seated casually on the edge of a wooden bench/table, leaning slightly forward and turning to look back at the camera.",
    "camera_facing": "3/4 front — body is angled towards the left of the frame, chest facing left, while the head turns back over the shoulder towards the camera.",
    "body_axis_to_camera": "torso is turned approximately 45-60 degrees to the left of the camera.",
    "depth_direction": "body recedes diagonally into the frame to the left, while the head and gaze pull forward to the viewer, creating dimensional depth.",
    "legs": "thighs visible, resting on the wooden bench, casually positioned with right leg slightly extending forward.",
    "arms": "right arm bent, holding the strap of the tote bag on the shoulder; left arm extending downward, hand resting on the wooden surface behind/beside the hip.",
    "hand_action": "right hand lightly gripping the white canvas tote bag straps near the collarbone; left hand gently resting flat on the wooden bench (fingers partially visible).",
    "upper_body": "torso turned 45 degrees left, shoulders relaxed, posture is casually slouched but elegant.",
    "head": "turned to the right (relative to the torso) to face the camera directly.",
    "head_tilt": "very slight, natural lateral tilt towards the left shoulder (viewer's right).",
    "head_turn": "turned approx 45-60 degrees right relative to the chest, falling comfortably within a natural neck range.",
    "chin": "level, neutral position.",
    "neck_anatomy": "neck connects naturally to the shoulder, displaying realistic twisting muscle tension (sternocleidomastoid) due to the head turn over the shoulder.",
    "shoulder_anatomy": "right shoulder slightly raised holding the bag, left shoulder dropped naturally. No awkward foreshortening.",
    "posture": "relaxed, comfortable, seated leaning slightly back on the supporting left arm.",
    "overall_impression": "a candid, comfortable, and natural posing moment as if she just turned around when someone called her name.",
    "adjustment_rule": "Prioritize the natural twist of the neck and the relaxing weight distribution on the left arm over rigid posture."
  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "daylight with strong backlighting / rim light",
    "quality": "bright, soft, and highly dimensional",
    "source": "strong sunlight from the upper right rear (viewer's top right), acting as a backlight. Soft, diffused ambient fill light from the front.",

prompts.text:
Cinematic water portrait, “Liquid Silence Portraits”. Adult young East Asian woman half-submerged in a bright natural water scene, soft ivory fabric dress, damp hair, high-angle close half-body composition, shoulders and large water surface visible.

Keep the face natural, alive and clean, with healthy realistic complexion and natural lip color. Bright natural daylight, subtle water reflections, light mainly on the water, shoulders and fabric, not cutting across the face.

Quiet fashion editorial / perfume campaign mood, realistic photography, soft fabric details, natural water movement, vertical 9:16, no text.

prompts.title: Stylish Cool Portrait with Sunglasses and Cable
prompts.text:
GENERATION_PROMPT

Use the newly attached reference image as the sole facial identity reference. Preserve that person's facial identity, facial structure, natural asymmetry, eye shape, nose, lips, cheek contour, jawline, chin, and skin tone behavior. Do not copy or blend the facial identity from the source reference image(s) used to create this prompt. Apply only the expression, gaze, pose, camera framing, lighting, color, and atmosphere described below.

This is a high-contrast, illustrative macro close-up portrait with a playful and intriguing mood. The subject looks directly into the camera with focused blue eyes, framed from above large, mirrored aviator-style sunglasses. Their lips are slightly parted in an expression of curiosity and playful intrigue. A hand is present on the left side of the frame, with blue-painted fingernails, gently lifting the sunglasses away from the face with one finger. A thin black cable (headphone wire) is held lightly between the lips. The head is tilted slightly down. The camera distance is very close, a macro-portrait perspective cropped tightly around the face and collarbones. The lighting is harsh, direct summer sun from the front-high, creating defined, deep shadows under the nose, chin, and hair, highlighting skin texture. Platinum blonde hair frames the face, casting intricate shadow patterns. The reflection in the large, blue-tinted mirrored sunglasses is a clear, detailed view of a vibrant blue sky with white clouds. The background is a minimalist, stark white. The image has a clean, polished, illustrative feel with sharp lines and high-detail textures on the cable and skin, but rendered photorealistically. The color palette consists of the pale skin, platinum blonde, the vibrant blue reflection and eyes, and the white background. Sharp focus on the face and key props.

NEGATIVE_PROMPT

Blending features from different people, facial identity distortion, facial asymmetry errors, flat lighting, dull colors, lack of reflection in sunglasses, missing cable, incorrect hand pose, extra fingers, cartoonish proportions, blurry focus, poor skin texture, studio lighting, soft shadows, generic background, missing key props, unnatural expression,

A long zip-up hoodie slips off one shoulder, revealing her collarbone and warm skin tone. The composition is intimate and casual, resembling a webcam selfie. prompts.text:
Photorealistic upper-body luxury beauty portrait of [CHARACTER] in a subtle low-angle elegant editorial composition, preserving her canonical identity lock with absolute priority.

IDENTITY LOCK:
[CHARACTER]must remain clearly and unmistakably herself, never a generic model. [CHARACTER'S DETAILS] . It should frame her face elegantly and fall gracefully over her shoulders, with realistic strands and soft editorial movement.

Her eyes are warm brown and expressive, one of her defining features. They should convey beauty, intelligence, composure, and gentle emotional depth. Her expression is calm, elegant, and quietly confident, with a subtle softness that preserves her recognizable charm. She must remain unmistakably Chizuru, not a generic Japanese beauty model.

Her face is refined and feminine, with youthful adult features, a delicate jawline, and balanced proportions. Skin is warm fair-to-light ivory with realistic pores, natural skin texture, subtle peach warmth, soft blush, and gentle luminous highlights on the cheekbones, brow bone, and nose bridge.

MAKEUP:
[PASTE MAKEUP HERE]

POSE AND CAMERA:
[CHARACTER]is shown from the upper body in a subtle low-angle power-beauty portrait. The camera is positioned slightly below chest height and tilted gently upward toward her face, giving her a poised, radiant, softly authoritative presence without aggression. Her chin is softly lifted. Her head is turned three-quarters to the right. Her eyes look calmly toward the lens with elegant confidence and composed warmth. The crop runs from head to mid-torso, emphasizing face, eyes, lips, neck, collarbone, shoulders, and hair.

CLOTHING:
She wears a modern elegant top designed to keep the portrait focused on her identity and makeup. The top should be sleeveless, strapless, with bare shoulders and a clearly visible collarbone. The design should feel refined, feminine, clean, and luxurious, with a subtle romantic-modern fashion influence inspired by [CHARACTER] style. Use soft light tones or tasteful warm accents with understated detailing only. The outfit must never distract from the face.

LIGHTING AND BACKGROUND:
Use large diffused key light, soft warm frontal fill, and a gentle rim light that adds depth to the hair and shoulders. The background should be softly blurred with pastel peach, soft beige, warm cream, and muted rose tones. Keep the environment elegant and unobtrusive, secondary to the character.

Aesthetic:
Luxury beauty editorial photography, medium-format beauty look, 100mm beauty lens, f/2.8, sharp focus on the eyes, shallow depth of field, hyperrealistic skin texture, photorealistic materials, cinematic soft lighting, magazine-cover quality, highly detailed, elegant, radiant, refined, feminine, graceful, quietly powerful.

極細銀框圓眼鏡、多層銀色項鍊、星星吊墜、不對稱耳環、霧銀戒指、幻彩星星髮夾。

白色星星印花U領短背心、細肩帶，淺灰格紋高腰熱褲。

日系甜酷清冷妝。

奶茶灰粉眼影、自然臥蠶、長睫毛、淺灰棕瞳色、柔霧粉腮紅、鏡面果凍粉唇，眼神慵懶迷離。

Japanese creative studio bedroom.

日系創作少女工作室，透明收納櫃、耳機、衣架、化妝小物、壓克力收納盒與生活雜物背景。

灰白低飽和色調，搭配白色塗鴉字體、幻彩星星粒子、微光星塵、淡淡彩虹折射效果。

近景半身構圖，自然側坐，腰部微扭，肩膀放鬆，頭部微微後仰，下巴輕抬。

一手自然垂放，一手輕扶褲緣，手指舒展。

眼神直視鏡頭，雙唇微張，神情慵懶冷淡，帶有甜酷少女感與距離感。

85mm portrait lens, f/1.8, full-frame DSLR, shallow depth of field, soft window light with cool fill light, silver rim light, Japanese fashion editorial photography, LARME × NYLON JAPAN × ViVi magazine style.

Perfect human anatomy, realistic proportions, five fingers, no extra fingers, no malformed hands, ultra-detailed textures, no noise, no grain.

8K, masterpiece, magazine cover quality, 2:3, 4096×6144.

prompts.title: 로멘틱 가든
prompts.text:
[Purpose]
Create a vertical fine-art portrait based on the uploaded reference photo or photos, preserving the subject’s recognizable facial identity, natural appearance, and overall persona as the highest priority.

The final image should feel like a dreamy, romantic garden portrait with a calm emotional tone. It should convey poetic stillness, quiet beauty, slight melancholy, and the feeling of time momentarily standing still during a peaceful garden walk.

[Identity Preservation]
Use the uploaded reference image(s) only as the identity reference for the subject.

The generated woman must clearly look like the same person as in the reference photo(s). Preserve her core facial features very closely, including:

face shape and head shape

forehead proportion and hairline

eye shape, size, and spacing

nose bridge, nose tip, and overall nose structure

lip shape, thickness, and natural mouth impression

jawline, chin, and cheek contour

skin tone and natural complexion

overall age impression

natural facial asymmetry

subtle personal features and unique facial character

the subject’s original persona and emotional aura


Do not redesign her face. Do not overly beautify her. Do not make her look like a different person.

Her hairstyle and facial expression should follow the prompt content as closely as possible while still preserving the recognizable identity and persona of the original subject.

[Expression Reference]
Use the uploaded image as an additional expression reference.

The expression should be inspired by the attached image: quiet, calm, introspective, and slightly melancholic.
She looks toward the camera with a gentle, emotionally restrained gaze. Her lips are softly relaxed and slightly parted, without a broad smile. The overall feeling is delicate, inward, wistful, and softly lonely rather than dramatic or exaggerated.

Keep the expression subtle and natural, with the same quiet emotional tone as the uploaded image.

[Scene]
Place the subject in a lush, flower-filled garden overflowing with blooming flowers and soft green foliage.

The background should feel dense and enveloping, as if leaves and flowers are surrounding the subject, but it should remain softly out of focus and melt into a creamy bokeh.

Small white and pale peach flower petals drift gently through the air in a light breeze. Some petals pass in front of the subject as soft foreground elements, while others remain blurred in the background.

The atmosphere should feel dreamy, romantic, quiet, poetic, and gently melancholic.

[Main Subject]
Show the same young woman from the reference image(s) standing at the center of the frame in a waist-up fine-art portrait.

Her hairstyle should follow the original prompt as closely as possible: short, softly tousled dark hair with a natural, slightly messy appearance. The hair should feel light, soft, and effortless, as if gently disturbed by the air. Keep the hairstyle visually natural and delicate, without making it overly polished or artificially styled.

She looks quietly toward the camera with a calm, introspective, slightly melancholic expression based on the attached image reference. Her emotional tone should remain subdued, inward, and poetic—calm, reserved, faintly wistful, and softly lonely.

She wears a muted teal dress with a subtle vintage floral pattern. The dress should not feel like a modern fashion advertisement piece, but rather a refined, understated garment with delicate fabric texture and a soft vintage sensibility.

Her skin should be rendered with realistic texture, including natural skin grain, subtle blush, and soft shading.

[Style]
This is a high-resolution vertical portrait combining fine-art portrait photography and cinematic realism.

It should have the visual compression and shallow depth of field of an 85mm lens. Focus on the subject should be soft yet precise, especially around the eyes and face.

Use a muted, painterly color grade centered around muted greens, soft teal, pale peach, and white highlights.

The image must feel like photorealistic fine-art photography, not a cartoon, anime, or digital illustration. Preserve natural skin texture and realistic textile detail.

[Composition]
Use an elegant centered composition in a vertical 2:3 aspect ratio.

Frame the subject as a waist-up portrait, with a little breathing room above the head and enough of the shoulders and upper part of the dress visible.

The camera should face the subject from near eye level and close to a straight-on angle.

The subject’s eyes and face should be the first focal point, followed naturally by the drifting flower petals and the softly blurred garden background.

Keep the background softly defocused with shallow depth of field so it remains lush and rich without becoming visually busy. A few foreground petals may pass slightly out of focus to create depth.

[Lighting]
Use soft natural light under an overcast sky.

There should be no harsh direct sunlight and no sharp shadows. The face should be wrapped in broad, even diffused light.

Skin highlights should remain subtle, with only very soft shadows under the chin and around the eyes.

Fine highlights may appear on the folds of the dress and the edges of the flower petals.

The background foliage should remain moist, calm, and subdued in tone rather than shiny or overly bright.

[Color and Mood]
The overall color palette should remain muted and painterly.

Emphasize soft greens, muted teal, pale peach, and restrained white accents.

The mood should be dreamy, romantic, quiet, and gently melancholic.

It should feel like a refined fine-art portrait with emotional restraint and poetic stillness rather than a bold commercial fashion image.

[Text]
No Korean text.
No visible text in the image.

[Material and Detail]
Preserve realistic skin texture instead of overly smoothing it.

Show delicate fabric texture in the dress, subtle natural hair detail, and believable optical lens bokeh.

The flower petals should feel light and airy. The surrounding flowers and leaves should feel lush but softly blurred.

The overall result should feel like a premium fine-art photographic portrait.

[Negative Constraints]
Do not change the subject into a different person.
Do not overly beautify or stylize the face.
Do not create plastic-smooth skin.
Do not use oversaturated colors.
Do not use harsh lighting or sharp dramatic shadows.
Do not make the image look like a modern fashion advertisement.
Do not make the background overly sharp, crowded, or distracting.
Do not introduce cartoon, anime, 3D-rendered, or painterly illustration textures.
Do not lose the dreamy, restrained, melancholic fine-art mood.
Do not replace the short softly tousled dark hairstyle or the calm, introspective, slightly melancholic expression unless necessary for realism; these should follow the prompt content as closely as possible while keeping the subject’s identity intact.

prompts.title: 하얀 배개를 배고 자는 모습
prompts.text:
Create a photorealistic portrait based on the uploaded reference photo or photos, preserving the subject’s recognizable facial identity and overall persona as the highest priority.

The generated woman must clearly look like the same person as in the reference image(s). Use the uploaded photo(s) only as identity reference. Preserve her core facial features very closely, including:

face shape and head shape

forehead proportion and hairline

eye shape, size, and spacing

nose bridge, nose tip, and overall nose structure

lip shape, thickness, and natural mouth impression

jawline, chin, and cheek contour

skin tone and natural complexion

overall age impression

natural facial asymmetry and unique personal features


Do not redesign her face, do not overly beautify her, and do not make her look like a different person. Keep her personal aura and persona intact: soft, natural, intimate, feminine, calm, and quietly vulnerable.

Show the same young adult Asian woman lying on her side in bed with her head resting gently on a plump white pillow. She is wearing a loose silky sleep camisole in soft ivory. Her makeup is minimal, with a natural bare-faced glow, fresh-skin look, and lightly brushed brows. Her hair is messy and loosely tousled, fanned naturally across the pillow, with a few strands falling around her face. She wears small delicate stud earrings.

Her body is covered with a white plush duvet. One arm is softly folded and tucked under the pillow, while the other hand gently rubs her face as she lets out a wide, natural yawn. Her body looks fully relaxed, comfortably sinking into crisp white bedding, with her knees loosely bent.

The bed features crisp white linen pillowcases, and a white upholstered headboard is visible behind her. A warm-toned bedside lamp glows softly nearby, while ambient early-morning light filters through sheer curtains. The room should have a white-on-white bedroom palette with pale silver-gray undertones, creating a quiet, intimate, feminine domestic mood with warmth and emotional softness.

Style: ultra-high-resolution photorealistic portrait photography, realistic skin texture, subtle imperfections, natural fabric detail, refined lighting, soft cinematic realism.
Camera: 85mm f/1.8 portrait lens, ISO 400, 1/200s shutter speed, wide aperture, shallow depth of field.
Composition: close, intimate upper-body to mid-body framing, with the subject as the clear emotional center of the image.

images.note: 요건 서비스사진, 분위기만 바꿔봤었음

prompts.title: 시드니 하버브릿지 여행화보
prompts.text:
[Purpose]
첨부한 사진 또는 사진들 속 인물의 얼굴 생김새, 고유한 분위기, 전체적인 페르소나를 정확히 유지한 채, 호주 시드니 하버 브릿지를 배경으로 한 자연스러운 야외 여행 스냅 포트레이트를 만든다.
이미지는 연출된 화보보다는 실제 여행 중 우연히 찍힌 듯한 고해상도 실사 사진 느낌을 목표로 한다.

[Identity Preservation]
첨부한 사진은 인물의 얼굴 정체성과 페르소나를 유지하기 위한 기준 이미지이다.
생성되는 인물은 반드시 참고 사진 속 인물과 같은 사람처럼 보여야 한다.

아래 요소를 가장 우선적으로 유지한다.

얼굴형과 두상

이마 비율과 헤어라인

눈매, 눈 크기, 눈 사이 간격

코 모양, 콧대, 코끝 구조

입술 모양, 두께, 입매의 고유한 인상

턱선, 광대, 볼 라인

피부톤과 자연스러운 안색

전체적인 나이대 인상

원본 인물 특유의 분위기와 페르소나

자연스러운 비대칭과 개인적인 얼굴 특징


얼굴을 새롭게 디자인하지 말고, 과하게 미화하거나 다른 사람처럼 바꾸지 않는다.
헤어스타일, 시선 방향, 표정은 장면에 맞게 자연스럽게 조정해도 되지만, 인물의 정체성과 고유한 인상은 반드시 유지한다.

[Main Subject]
첨부한 사진 속 동일 인물로 보이는 젊은 아시아 여성이 거친 질감의 돌 벤치에 편안하게 앉아 있다.
그녀는 자연스럽고 부드러운 분위기를 가진 여행자처럼 보이며, 차분하고 여유로운 미소를 짓고 있다.

피부는 맑고 투명하며, 자연광을 받아 건강하게 빛난다.
메이크업은 미니멀한 자연광 메이크업으로, 가벼운 베이스, 자연스러운 눈썹, 차분한 핑크빛 립 컬러 정도만 표현한다.

[Pose]
인물은 돌 벤치 위에 앉아 있으며, 오른쪽 다리를 왼쪽 다리 위에 자연스럽게 꼬고 있다.
몸은 약간 오른쪽으로 기울어진 편안한 자세이며, 전체적으로 여행 중 잠시 쉬는 듯한 자연스러운 느낌이다.

오른손에는 작은 은색 디지털 카메라를 들고 있으며, 눈높이 근처에서 오른쪽 방향을 바라보며 촬영하거나 무언가를 바라보는 순간이다.
왼손은 무릎 위에 편안하게 놓여 있다.

시선은 반드시 정면일 필요는 없으며, 오른쪽을 바라보거나 카메라를 조작하는 듯한 자연스러운 시선이어도 좋다.
표정은 원본 인물의 페르소나를 유지하면서, 은은한 미소, 집중한 눈빛, 편안한 여행자의 표정 중 장면에 어울리게 자연스럽게 표현한다.

[Face]
얼굴은 원본 인물의 생김새를 정확히 유지한다.
앵글은 오른쪽을 바라보는 4/4 측면 프로필 또는 자연스러운 세미 프로필 구도로 표현한다.
표정은 부드럽고 자연스러우며, 물체를 바라보는 집중된 눈빛이나 은은한 미소가 느껴지게 한다.

[Hair]
헤어스타일은 원본 인물의 분위기와 얼굴형에 어울리도록 자연스럽게 연출한다.
긴 어두운 밤색 또는 자연스러운 브라운 계열의 머리카락이 어깨와 등 쪽으로 부드럽게 흘러내린다.

바람에 살짝 흩날리는 잔머리와 자연스러운 머릿결을 표현하되, 얼굴의 주요 이목구비를 과하게 가리지 않게 한다.
앞머리나 옆머리는 자연스럽게 정리되어 얼굴선을 부드럽게 감싼다.
헤어스타일은 장면에 맞게 약간 달라져도 되지만, 인물의 고유한 인상과 페르소나는 유지한다.

[Wardrobe]
인물은 헐렁한 오프화이트 린넨 또는 면 소재의 셔츠 드레스를 입고 있다.
드레스는 V넥 칼라, 앞면 버튼, 3/4 소매 디자인이며, 부드럽고 자연스러운 주름과 소재감을 가진다.

신발은 무릎 높이까지 오는 스웨이드 베이지 부츠로, 전체 의상과 자연스럽게 어울리는 고급스럽고 편안한 여행 스타일이다.
의상은 노출이 과하지 않고, 차분하고 세련된 야외 여행룩처럼 보이게 한다.

[Accessories and Objects]
인물의 오른손에는 작은 은색 디지털 카메라가 들려 있다.
여성의 왼쪽 돌 벤치 위에는 갈색 스웨이드 버킷 백이 자연스럽게 놓여 있다.
여성의 오른쪽 돌 벤치 위에는 검은색 가죽 재킷이 접혀 있거나 편하게 걸쳐져 있다.

소품들은 과하게 정돈된 느낌이 아니라, 여행 중 잠시 내려놓은 개인 물건처럼 자연스럽게 배치한다.

[Background]
배경은 호주 시드니 하버 브릿지와 시드니 스카이라인이 보이는 해안 도시 풍경이다.
거대한 강철 아치형 하버 브릿지가 왼쪽에서 오른쪽으로 길게 뻗어 있으며, 다리 위에는 작은 국기와 보행자의 실루엣이 희미하게 보인다.

넓은 바다에는 잔물결이 있고, 멀리 작은 선박들이 지나간다.
하늘은 맑고 푸르며, 흩어진 흰 구름이 자연스럽게 떠 있다.
배경은 실제 시드니 여행지에서 촬영한 듯한 현실적인 공간감과 거리감을 가진다.

[Natural Environment]
낮 시간의 해안 도시 풍경이다.
바다의 물결, 맑은 하늘, 흩어진 구름, 돌 벤치의 거친 질감, 멀리 보이는 도시 스카이라인이 자연스럽게 어우러진다.
전체 분위기는 밝고 여유로운 여행 스냅, 따뜻한 도시 해안 풍경, 자연스러운 야외 포트레이트 느낌이다.

[Camera Geometry]
카메라는 아이레벨에 가깝지만, 앉아 있는 인물을 자연스럽게 담기 위해 약간 낮은 위치에서 촬영한다.
구도는 인물을 중심에 두되, 시드니 하버 브릿지와 바다 풍경이 배경으로 충분히 보이도록 한다.

수평선은 하버 브릿지의 아치 아래를 지나가며, 인물과 배경이 안정적으로 구성된다.
인물은 선명하게, 배경은 살짝 흐려져 공간감과 깊이가 느껴지게 한다.

[Lens and Photography Style]
고해상도 실사 야외 포트레이트 사진.
표준 줌 렌즈 또는 50mm~85mm 인물 렌즈 느낌.
얕은 피사계 심도를 사용해 인물과 돌 벤치는 선명하게 표현하고, 배경의 하버 브릿지와 스카이라인은 부드럽게 흐려진 보케로 표현한다.

사진은 너무 과하게 보정된 화보가 아니라, 자연스러운 여행 사진과 세련된 라이프스타일 포트레이트 사이의 느낌을 가진다.
자연스러운 그레인, 현실적인 피부 질감, 실제 카메라로 촬영한 듯한 색감과 디테일을 유지한다.

[Lighting]
낮 시간의 자연광.
햇빛은 왼쪽 상단에서 부드럽게 들어오며, 인물의 얼굴과 드레스 왼쪽 면을 자연스럽게 밝힌다.
오른쪽 면에는 부드러운 그림자가 생겨 입체감이 느껴진다.

그림자는 돌 벤치, 가죽 재킷, 가방 주변에 자연스럽게 드리워진다.
얼굴 조명은 너무 밝거나 납작하지 않게 하고, 자연광 특유의 부드러운 하이라이트와 섬세한 그림자를 살린다.

[Material Detail]
린넨 셔츠 드레스의 부드럽고 가벼운 주름, 스웨이드 부츠와 버킷 백의 보송하고 거친 질감, 검은색 가죽 재킷의 은은한 광택과 유연함, 돌 벤치의 거친 표면, 바다의 잔물결, 하버 브릿지의 단단한 금속 질감을 모두 현실적으로 표현한다.

[Color and Mood]
전체 색감은 따뜻하고 자연스럽다.
피부 톤, 오프화이트 드레스, 베이지 부츠, 갈색 가방, 회색 돌 벤치, 푸른 바다와 하늘이 조화롭게 어우러진다.

분위기는 차분하고 세련된 여행 스냅, 자연스러운 여성 포트레이트, 맑은 낮의 시드니 해안 감성이다.

[Negative Constraints]
원본 인물과 다른 얼굴로 만들지 않는다.
얼굴을 과하게 미화하지 않는다.
AI처럼 매끈한 피부, 플라스틱 같은 질감, 과한 보정, 과도한 눈 확대, 비현실적인 체형 왜곡을 피한다.
손가락, 다리, 카메라, 가방, 부츠의 형태가 어색하지 않게 한다.
배경의 시드니 하버 브릿지가 비현실적으로 왜곡되지 않게 한다.
얼굴을 머리카락이나 카메라가 과하게 가리지 않게 한다.

prompts.title: 노을진 해변의 캠핑
prompts.text:
[SPACE & BACKGROUND]: Secluded rocky beach during a dramatic sunset. The orange sun is low on the horizon, casting a vibrant golden light across the ocean and creating strong reflections on the water. In the foreground, a warm-lit canvas teepee tent stands on the sand, adorned with string lights. Next to the tent is a vintage brass kerosene lantern (lit) resting on a small wooden camping table, along with a stainless steel mug. In the middle distance, large rock formations break the horizon line.

[STYLING]: White ribbed-knit sleeveless tank top, fitted, with a soft texture. Medium-wash distressed denim jeans, full length, loose fit. Small, delicate silver stud earrings.

[APPEARANCE & MAKEUP]: East Asian female, slender build, clear smooth skin with a warm tone. Natural, dewy-finish makeup, light eyeliner, and soft coral lip tint. Hands are moisturized and resting naturally.

[HAIR]: Long, flowing dark brown hair with soft, natural waves, parted slightly to the side. Strands catch the golden light.

[CAMERA COLOR]: Warm, cinematic golden hour color palette with deep ambers, rich oranges, soft blues, and natural sandy tones.

[PHOTO TEXTURE & LIGHTING]: Shot on a 35mm f/2.8 prime lens. Natural twilight mixed with warm tungsten light from the lantern and string lights. Very subtle film grain. Aperture set low to create a soft bokeh effect on the ocean waves and distant rocks.
[VARIABLES GROUP] - SCENARIO 2: Adjusting Hair (Windy Coast)

[POSE & GESTURE]: Leaning slightly forward in the chair. Her left hand is raised, with fingers interlaced into her hair near her left temple, brushing a few loose strands back behind her ear. Fingers are pushing through the hair, causing the hair mass to shift and some hairs to separate. A few strands are slightly caught around her fingers. Compression of her forearm and shoulder muscles is natural. Her right hand is resting loosely on her lap, palm up. The loose fit of her jeans causes them to bunch slightly on her thighs, creating visible fabric folds.

[GAZE]: Looking slightly upward and away to the right, toward the open sea, with a soft, reflective smile. Fine crow's feet visible at the corners of her eyes.

[REALISTIC IMPERFECTIONS]: Visible skin pores, especially where the golden light hits her cheek. Natural lip texture and faint lip tint. Flyaway hairs are prominent due to the hand movement and a light coastal breeze. Faint veins visible on the back of her hand and wrist. A slight oily sheen on her forehead.

[CAMERA ANGLE & SHOT]: Medium Shot. Capturing the subject's upper body and the physical interaction with her hair.

prompts.text:
[공간 및 배경]

장소: 전통 목조 수상 가옥이 늘어선 해안가 마을

계절: 초가을

시간대: 오후 3시

날씨: 맑음

기온감: 선선한 18도

광원 방향: 피사체 기준 우측 상단 45도

광원 종류: 직사 자연광

전경 객체: 아스팔트 노면, 노란색 실선 차선, 낡은 금속 파이프 울타리

중경 객체: 잔물결이 이는 에메랄드그린 해수면, 바구니가 달린 빈티지 화이트 시티 자전거

후경 객체: 다크 브라운 톤의 수상 목조 가옥 군락, 노란색과 주황색 단풍이 섞인 가파른 산비탈 숲

공간 구조: 해안 도로와 수면, 반대편 산자락이 평행하게 이어지는 선형 구조

원근감: 배경이 부드럽게 압축된 망원 원근감

[스타일링]

상의: 크림 아이보리 컬러, 오버핏 라운드넥 두꺼운 케이블 니트 스웨터, 굵은 짜임 텍스처, 드롭 숄더

하의: 화이트 컬러, 티어드 레이스 미니스커트, 얇은 쉬폰 및 플로럴 패턴 레이스 혼합 소재, A라인 핏

신발: 다크 브라운 컬러, 종아리 중간 기장의 가죽 미들 부츠, 3개의 금속 버클 스트랩 디테일, 청키한 러그 솔

가방: 블랙 컬러, 스퀘어 쉐입 미니 가죽 크로스백, 얇은 가죽 스트랩, 골드 메탈 버클

[외모형 및 메이크업]

인종: 동아시아인

체형: 슬림한 체형

피부톤: 밝은 쿨톤

피부 질감: 수분감이 감도는 매끄러운 텍스처 (Glass Skin)

메이크업 질감: 피치 코랄 톤의 크림 블러셔, 글로시한 코랄 레드 립

눈썹 특성: 일자형 아치 디자인, 짙은 브라운 컬러, 결이 정돈된 형태

[헤어]

길이: 가슴 선 아래로 내려오는 롱 렝스

색상: 다크 브라운

가르마: 5:5 중앙 가르마

컬: 굵고 자연스럽게 떨어지는 루즈 웨이브

질감: 빛을 받아 윤기가 도는 매끄러운 텍스처

볼륨: 두상 실루엣을 따라 차분하게 정돈된 볼륨

묶음 여부: 풀려있는 상태

[카메라 색감]

화이트밸런스: 5500K (따뜻한 앰버 톤 가미)

색온도: 웜톤

채도: 중간 채도

대비: 중간 대비 (암부 디테일이 보존됨)

컬러 팔레트: 크림, 에메랄드그린, 딥 브라운, 오렌지 옐로우

필름 스타일: Kodak Portra 400

HDR 특성: 명부 하이라이트와 섀도우가 부드럽게 연결되는 계조

[사진 질감 및 조명]

Camera Body: 풀프레임 미러리스 카메라

Lens: 50mm Prime Lens

Focal Length: 50mm

Aperture: f/2.8

ISO: 100

Shutter Speed: 1/1000s

Lighting Type: Hard Natural Sunlight

Lighting Direction: 피사체 우측 후방 측면광

Shadow Density: 피사체 좌측 하단에 부드럽고 얕은 그림자 형성, 우측 헤어 라인에 림 라이트(Rim Light) 생성

Film Grain: 미세한 필름 그레인

Sensor Noise: 노이즈 억제됨

[포즈 및 손짓]

몸의 방향: 하체는 정면 주행 방향, 상체는 우측 뒤로 120도 비틀어진 형태

팔 위치: 양팔은 자전거 핸들을 잡기 위해 앞쪽으로 뻗어 약간 구부러짐

다리 위치: 우측 다리는 무릎을 굽혀 페달에 부츠를 올린 상태, 좌측 다리는 지면을 향해 뻗어 하중 지탱

손 위치: 양손 모두 자전거 핸들 그립을 감싸 쥐고 있음

소품 접촉: 핸들을 쥔 손가락 마디의 굴곡, 자전거 안장과 허벅지에 눌려 형태가 잡힌 스커트 주름, 우측 어깨를 누르는 크로스백 스트랩의 장력

[시선]

시선 방향: 우측 어깨너머 후방의 렌즈를 정면으로 응시

눈꺼풀 상태: 힘을 뺀 이완된 상태

감정선: 차분함, 고요함

미세 표정: 입술을 가볍게 다물고 입꼬리 긴장을 푼 상태

[카메라 앵글 및 샷]

촬영 거리: 3~4m

카메라 높이: 인물의 허리 위치 (Waist-level)

카메라 각도: 아이레벨과 로우앵글의 중간

샷 크기: 휠 하단이 잘린 미디엄 롱 샷 (Medium Long Shot)

프레이밍: 피사체를 중앙에서 좌측으로 약간 치우치게 배치

구도: 배경의 수평선과 도로의 사선이 교차하는 원근 구도

피사계 심도: 얕은 심도 (Shallow Depth of Field), 피사체 선명, 배경 블러 처리

prompts.text:
[공간 및 배경] 해안 절벽을 따라 운행하는 밝고 화창한 날의 관광용 청사포 캡슐 열차(모노레일) 내부 칸. 나무 벤치 좌석. 왼쪽 창문 밖으로 반대편 선로와 빨간색 열차가 보이며, 정면 창문 너머로 울창한 초록색 산과 푸른 바다, 맑은 하늘이 펼쳐진다. 인물 뒤편 상단에 '46'이라고 쓰인 둥근 표지판과 열차 주행 영상을 보여주는 작은 모니터가 설치되어 있다.

[스타일링] 연한 크림색/아이보리색 오프숄더 레이스 프릴 코튼 블라우스, 워싱된 데님 숏팬츠, 갈색 가죽 벨트. 머리 위에 쓴 갈색 호피 무늬 선글라스. 얇은 금색 목걸이, 얇은 금색 팔찌 (오른쪽 손목). 왼쪽 나무 벤치 위에 놓인 검은색 퀼팅 가죽 핸드백 (Lady Dior 스타일, 금색 'D.I.O.R.' 참 장식). 가방 핸들에 달린 흰색 토끼 인형 참.

[외모형 및 메이크업] 하얀 피부의 동양인 여성. 자연스러운 데일리 메이크업, 볼에 은은한 블러셔, 생기 있는 입술. 깨끗하고 건강한 피부 질감.

[헤어] 검은색 어깨 길이의 자연스러운 단발 웨이브. 볼륨감이 있고 자연스럽게 정리된 스타일.

[카메라 색감] 따뜻하고 부드러운 필름 룩. 자연광에 어우러진 차분한 색 온도와 풍부한 계조. 선명하고 생생한 풍경 대비.

[사진 질감 및 조명] 자연광 (오후의 창문 조명). 오른쪽 창문을 통해 들어오는 따뜻한 햇살이 인물의 얼굴과 머리카락에 하이라이트를 형성하며, 자연스러운 그림자를 만든다. 미세한 필름 그레인. f/2.5 aperture로 촬영하여 인물에 초점을 맞추고 배경을 부드럽게 흐림.

[포즈 및 손짓] 카메라를 바라보며 손가락 하트를 하고 있는 자세. 양쪽 엄지손가락과 검지손가락이하트 모양을 만들고 있으며, 눈은 살짝 감겨 반달 눈웃음에, 살짝 미소 짓는 있는 입. 
[시선] 카메라를 바라보기 위해 얼굴을 살짝 위로 들고 있으며, 카메라를 바라보고 있음. 
[카메라 앵글 및 샷] 정면 웨이스트 샷(Waist Shot). 인물의 머리위에서 밑으로 내려다보며 찍은 샷. 열차 내부의 수직적 공간 구조와 벤치에 앉은 인물의 전체 체형, 옆에 놓인 가방의 위치 관계가 모두 프레임 안에 포함됨.

prompts.text:
[공간 및 배경]: 만개한 벚꽃 나무 아래, 흰색 레이스 피크닉 매트 위. 화창한 봄 정오, 맑고 푸른 하늘과 솜사탕 같은 흰 구름. 멀리 흐릿한 도심 스카이라인. 매트와 책 위에 흩뿌려진 벚꽃 잎사귀들.

[스타일링]: 크림색 아이렛 레이스 자수 디테일의 퍼프 소매 면 블라우스.

[외모형 및 메이크업]: 슬림한 체형의 젊은 동아시아 여성. 얇은 로즈 골드 와이어 프레임 안경 착용. 뽀얀 피부와 자연스러운 핑크빛 입술 메이크업.

[헤어]: 긴 초콜릿 브라운 웨이브 헤어, 자연스럽게 어깨와 매트 위에 퍼짐.

[카메라 색감]: 따뜻하고 부드러운 파스텔 톤 앤 매너. 복고풍 필름 사진 질감과 높은 채도의 벚꽃 색상 조화.

[사진 질감 및 조명]: 35mm f/1.4 렌즈, 조리개 f/1.8 개방, 극도로 얕은 피사계 심도. 부드러운 자연광. 미세한 필름 그레인. 깨끗하고 부드러운 피부 질감.

[포즈 및 손짓]: 흰색 레이스 매트에 엎드린 자세. 왼팔로 책 더미(핑크색 하드커버 포함 두 권)를 지탱. 오른팔로 실버/블랙 빈티지 필름 카메라를 들어 올려 셀카 각도로 유지.

[시선]: 카메라 렌즈를 정면으로 바라보는 맑고 또렷한 눈빛. 자연스럽고 편안한 미소.

[카메라 앵글 및 샷]: 클로즈업 셀카 샷. 약간 높은 각도에서 인물의 얼굴, 어깨, 카메라, 책이 모두 담김.

Create a full-body high-fashion studio portrait with an elevated ivory luxury blazer-core aesthetic. The mood is elegant, powerful, expensive, and magazine-ready with sculptural couture styling.

Pose: full-body editorial standing pose beside a tall white pedestal. One hand rests lightly on the pedestal while the other adjusts the tie. One leg crosses slightly in front of the other, creating a long elegant silhouette. The posture feels controlled, powerful, and cover-worthy.
Background: minimalist sculptural white studio with curved ivory walls, pedestal blocks, seamless flooring, and soft architectural shadows. Clean, luxurious, and gallery-inspired with no clutter or text.
Style: realistic high-fashion magazine photography with cinematic lighting, visible skin texture, realistic tailoring details, refined black-and-ivory contrast, fine 35mm film grain, subtle analog texture, faded blacks, gentle highlight bloom, slight film softness, magazine scan texture, and muted editorial grading. Camera: vertical full-body portrait, 85mm lens, f/4, ISO 400, 1/250s, large front-left softbox, soft fill light from the right, subtle shoulder rim light, and clean studio shadows.
